title: Facebook Ads Account Manager
description:
Hi,



We're an advertising agency looking for a reliable and detail-oriented VA/Account Manager to help us with day-to-day tasks inside
 Ads Manager. This is a part-time role with the potential to grow into full-time.



Tasks (not limited to):



Uploading & organizing ads into the correct ad accounts, ensuring proper campaign structure, naming conventions, and pixel setup.



Daily monitoring of ad campaigns – checking spend, CTR, CPM, CPC, and flagging any unusual activity.



Updating reports (Google Sheets/Excel) with daily/weekly performance numbers.



Budget pacing checks – ensuring campaigns don’t overspend or underspend.



Basic troubleshooting – checking disapproved ads, verifying pixel/tracking issues.



Coordinating with designers & copywriters to ensure creatives are uploaded on time.



(Optional if skilled) Launching new campaigns following provided SOPs.



Requirements:



Strong familiarity with
 Ads Manager.



Attention to detail (campaign structure & tracking accuracy is critical).



Comfortable with Google Sheets/Excel.



Fast learner with the ability to follow SOPs.

title: Growth Marketing Manager – Google & Meta Ads (Remote | Competitive Pay | Certified Required)
description:
Company Overview

LevelUp is a specialized BPO company that partners with technology companies across the US, UK, Europe, and Canada to provide tailored outsourcing solutions. For over seven years, we’ve built a reputation for delivering high-quality operational and back-office support, helping our clients scale efficiently. Our team consists of highly skilled and passionate professionals who are dedicated to providing exceptional service, technical expertise, and seamless support to our clients.



 

Position Overview

We’re looking for a data-driven Growth Marketing Manager with hands-on experience in Google Ads and
 Ads to manage end-to-end paid campaigns for our clients. The ideal candidate has a strong track record of driving measurable results across search, display, video, and social ad platforms.



Key Responsibilities

Plan, execute, and optimize high-performing PPC campaigns on Google Ads (Search, Display, YouTube) and
/Meta Ads (including Instagram).

Analyze campaign data, extract insights, and provide strategic recommendations to improve ROI.

Conduct A/B testing on ad creatives, targeting, and bidding strategies for ongoing performance improvement.

Create compelling ad copy and work closely with design teams to produce engaging creatives.

Track performance using tools like Google Analytics,
 Pixel, and platform-specific dashboards.

Manage ad budgets effectively, ensuring campaigns are on track with pacing, spend, and target KPIs (CTR, CPC, ROAS, CPA).

Prepare and deliver detailed performance reports to clients and stakeholders.

Stay current with industry trends, platform updates, and emerging best practices in PPC advertising.



Qualifications (Must-have Skills):

Minimum of 3 years of experience managing Google Ads and
 Ads campaigns.

Google Ads and Meta Ads certifications are required

Proven ability to drive results (conversions, leads, sales) while managing multiple campaigns.

Skilled in setting up and optimizing conversion tracking, remarketing campaigns, and audience segmentation.

Exceptional copywriting skills for ad creatives.

Strong analytical mindset and proficiency in analytics tools (Google Analytics, Meta Ads Manager, etc.).

Excellent communication and collaboration skills.



Nice to Have:

Experience with other platforms (e.g., TikTok Ads, LinkedIn Ads).

Familiarity with CRO, landing page design, and SEO.

title: Executive Operations Leader / Project Manager
description:
Executive Operations Leader / Project Manager

Short-Term Rental Portfolio (Guesty / Airbnb / VRBO)



Location: Remote

Company Base: San Diego, California



About the Company



We are a fast-growing, systems-driven short-term rental company managing 30+ premium properties across Southern California, with plans to scale significantly.



Our portfolio includes high-end properties with complex amenities such as:



• Pools

• Hot tubs and jacuzzis

• Saunas

• Smart home systems

• Multi-level homes requiring coordinated operations



Running these properties requires excellent coordination between guest communication teams, cleaners, maintenance crews, pricing management, and operations staff.



We already have a team of capable virtual assistants handling many day-to-day tasks, but we are now seeking a high-level operations leader who can step in, organize the system, strengthen processes, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks.



This is not a typical virtual assistant role.



We are looking for someone who can take the ball by the horns and truly run the operation.



Our goal is to build a well-oiled machine where systems, processes, and team accountability allow the company to scale efficiently without constant owner involvement.



The Role



We are seeking an Executive Operations Leader / Project Manager with deep experience in short-term rental operations and Guesty PMS.



This person will help oversee the operation, improve systems, organize the team, and ensure daily operations run smoothly.



You should be someone who can quickly understand a complex operation and bring structure, efficiency, and accountability to the business.



This role may begin as a consulting or part-time leadership position (5–15 hours per week) and may expand into a larger operational leadership role depending on fit.



Our Current Tech Stack



We rely heavily on technology and systems to run the business efficiently.



Our current tools include:



• Guesty – property management system

• Slack – communication with our virtual assistant team

• WhatsApp – communication with cleaners and field teams when needed

• 
 – operational task tracking including maintenance, lost and found, and other issues

• Google Workspace – Sheets, Docs, Drive

• Excel



We are currently evaluating additional tools including:



• Guesty Price Optimizer

• PriceLabs

• Breezeway

• Perto



The person in this role may help evaluate, implement, and optimize these systems.



Key Responsibilities



Operational Leadership



• Oversee daily operations across the short-term rental portfolio

• Identify inefficiencies and implement improvements

• Ensure operational tasks are tracked and completed

• Create structure, accountability, and clear workflows



Team Management



• Lead and organize a team of virtual assistants

• Delegate tasks effectively

• Ensure nothing falls into the operational “black hole”

• Improve communication between guest support, cleaners, and maintenance teams



Systems & Process Improvement



• Improve internal systems and standard operating procedures

• Optimize Guesty automations and workflows

• Improve task management and reporting in 

• Implement scalable operational processes as the business grows



Pricing & Revenue Support



• Help implement and optimize dynamic pricing tools such as PriceLabs or Guesty Price Optimizer

• Monitor calendar accuracy and pricing coordination

• Support availability management across Airbnb, VRBO, and direct bookings



Guest & Vendor Communication



• Serve as a senior escalation point for complex guest issues

• Communicate confidently with guests, vendors, and tea
mbers when necessary

• Ensure high standards of guest experience across the portfolio



Reporting & Accountability



• Create operational dashboards and reporting for ownership

• Track key operational metrics

• Identify opportunities to increase efficiency and profitability



Technology & AI



• Use tools such as ChatGPT and other AI platforms to improve workflows, documentation, and operational efficiency



Required Experience



We are looking for someone who has helped run or scale a serious operation before.



You should have:



• Extensive experience with Guesty PMS

• Strong experience in short-term rental operations

• Experience managing properties listed on Airbnb and VRBO

• Experience managing remote teams and virtual assistants

• Strong operational leadership and project management ability

• Experience implementing systems, SOPs, and operational workflows

• Strong written and spoken English

• Ability to confidently communicate with guests, vendors, and tea
mbers

• Strong organization and problem-solving skills



Highly Preferred Experience



• Experience with dynamic pricing tools (PriceLabs, Wheelhouse, Guesty Price Optimizer)

• Experience managing large STR portfolios

• Experience managing properties with pools, hot tubs, and complex maintenance coordination

• Experience with Slack and 

• Experience implementing operations software such as Breezeway or similar tools



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who is:



• Highly organized

• Systems-driven

• Proactive and reliable

• A strong communicator

• Comfortable leading a team

• Able to take ownership of complex operations



Most importantly, we want someone who can step in, take responsibility, and help build a world-class short-term rental operation.



Time Commitment



Flexible.



Expected initial commitment:



5–15 hours per week



This role may expand into a larger operational leadership position depending on fit.



Compensation



Competitive and based on experience.



Opportunities for long-term growth, increased responsibility, and performance-based raises.

title: Wholesale Coordinator
description:
Location: Remote 

Reports To: Wholesale Directors

Department: Wholesale



About Chamelo

Chamelo is a celebrity-backed brand growing triple digits. We bootstrapped our way to 8-figures and are about to close a VC round with the goal to accelerate growth toward an IPO.

At Chamelo, we’re engineering a new era of smart eyewear by combining state-of-the-art technology with cutting-edge style. Our mission goes beyond creating dynamic and stylish glasses—we’re pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in a traditionally static industry.

Our eyewear isn’t just functional—it’s bold, customizable, and effortlessly cool. Backed by iconic figures like Shaquille O’Neal and Bad Bunny, Chamelo is on pace for rapid expansion, offering an exciting opportunity to be part of our growth story.



About the Role

We are hiring two highly organized and detail-driven Wholesale Coordinators to support the rapid expansion of Chamelo’s global B2B and retail partnerships.

This role is critical in managing the end-to-end wholesale order lifecycle — from account onboarding and order processing to fulfillment coordination, inventory allocation, and post-delivery support. You will serve as the operational backbone of the wholesale team, ensuring a seamless experience for retail partners while maintaining internal accuracy and efficiency.

The ideal candidates are proactive, data-driven, and thrive in a fast-paced environment where precision, communication, and follow-through are essential.



Key Responsibilities

Wholesale Order Management

Process and manage wholesale purchase orders from receipt to fulfillment.

Validate pricing, SKUs, quantities, payment terms, and shipping requirements.

Coordinate order entry, acknowledgments, and invoice accuracy.

Track order status and provide timely updates to wholesale partners and internal teams.

Account & Partner Support

Assist with onboarding new wholesale accounts, including documentation and system setup.

Serve as a primary point of contact for order-related inquiries and operational requests.

Maintain strong, professional communication with retail buyers and distributors.

Support key accounts to ensure smooth reorders and ongoing partnership growth.

Inventory Allocation & Fulfillment Coordination

Work closely with supply chain and warehouse/3PL partners to allocate inventory for wholesale orders.

Monitor stock availability and communicate potential shortages or delays proactively.

Coordinate shipment scheduling and routing based on partner requirements and delivery windows.

Ensure compliance with retailer routing guides and packaging standards.

Data Management & Reporting

Maintain accurate wholesale data across ERP/CRM/order management systems.

Track wholesale KPIs such as order accuracy, fulfillment timelines, sell-through support, and backorder rates.

Assist in preparing weekly and monthly wholesale performance reports.

Help maintain up-to-date account records, price lists, and line sheets.

Cross-Team Collaboration

Partner with Sales, Finance, Supply Chain, and Customer Experience to ensure seamless execution.

Support product launches, seasonal buys, and promotional campaigns from an operational perspective.

Assist with trade shows, market appointments, and sample coordination as needed.

Contribute to building and improving scalable wholesale SOPs and workflows.



Qualifications

Strong organizational and time management skills with exceptional attention to detail.

Experience in wholesale, B2B sales support, order management, or supply chain coordination, preferably in ecommerce or consumer goods.

Proficiency with ERP/CRM systems, inventory tools, and Google Workspace/Microsoft Office.

Ability to manage multiple accounts and orders simultaneously in a deadline-driven environment.

Clear and professional written and verbal communication.

Solution-oriented mindset with a proactive approach to problem-solving.

Experience working with global retail partners, distributors, or 3PLs is a strong advantage.



What We Offer

Competitive above-market salary.

Paid time off and paid holidays.

13th month pay.

Regular performance bonus.

Annual salary bonus/increases based on performance.

Remote-friendly work environment.

Fun and collaborative culture with team contests.



Application Process

Please send your resume and answers to the following questions to 

Subject Line: “Wholesale Operator!”

Application Questions

If you could be one famous entrepreneur (alive or dead), who would you be and why?

One paragraph (5 sentences max) on any relevant experience you have.

Your favorite productivity hack.

What are your key strengths?

What are your weaknesses?

Your desired number of weekly hours & desired start date.

Your availability next week for a quick chat.

Equal Opportunity

Chamelo is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

title: Nonprofit Senior Bookkeeper
description:
About the Firm

We are a USA-based accounting and advisory firm dedicated exclusively to serving nonprofit organizations and mental health practices. We manage the complete accounting cycle for a portfolio of nonprofit clients simultaneously, delivering accurate, timely, and audit-ready financial records. Our clients trust us with the financial foundation of their missions. Every team member we bring on is expected to perform at a professional level from day one, follow our documented systems, and take genuine ownership of their client portfolio. 



About the Role

We are seeking an experienced Senior Bookkeeper to own the full accounting cycle for a portfolio of nonprofit clients. This role begins part-time and expands to full-time as performance benchmarks are met. You will work within our established systems and be accountable to firm-wide accuracy and deadline standards from day one. This is not an entry-level role. You are expected to arrive with a fully developed competency in nonprofit accounting and the professional judgment to apply it independently across multiple clients in a remote environment.



Full Accounting Cycle Management

 - Record and classify all transactions on an accrual basis in the accounting system with proper account coding, class tracking, and fund designation.

 - Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable: enter vendor bills, process payments, record invoices, and apply receipts accurately.

 - Prepare and post all month-end journal entries, including accruals, prepaid amortization, depreciation, and deferred revenue schedules.

 - Complete bank, credit card, and balance sheet account reconciliations to zero variance every month without exception.

 - Review the trial balance for anomalies, transposition errors, and misclassifications before financials are issued to clients.

 - Produce and deliver month-end financial statements: Statement of Financial Position, Statement of Activities, and Budget vs. Actual reports.



Nonprofit-Specific Accounting

 - Apply FASB ASC 958 and ASU 2016-14 standards, including proper net asset classification (with donor restrictions and without donor restrictions).

 - Track restricted and unrestricted funds separately and release restrictions when grant conditions are met with proper journal entry documentation.

 - Allocate expenses across program services, management and general, and fundraising functions using class tracking in QBO.

 - Prepare grant expenditure reports and supporting schedules for client grant reporting requirements.

 - Support Form 990 preparation by maintaining clean, organized records and preparing schedules as requested.

 - Coordinate with external auditors by providing supporting documentation, reconciling the PBC (Prepared by Client) list items, and responding to audit requests.

 - Record semi-monthly payroll journal entries with accurate allocation across cost centers, grants, and functional expense categories.

 - Reconcile payroll liability accounts monthly and confirm tax deposits are accurately reflected in the books.



Quality Control and Communication

 - Identify errors, inconsistencies, and missing information proactively before they reach the client.

 - Proactively communicate issues to the firm owner, team leads, and clients, including a proposed resolution in every notification.

 - Meet all client deliverable deadlines, maintaining a 98?curacy benchmark across all client work. 

 - Manage workload without micromanagement and follow the firm’s documented processes.



Required Qualifications

 - Minimum 5 years of accrual-basis nonprofit accounting experience with demonstrated ability to apply accrual accounting, including fund accounting, net asset classifications under ASU 2016-14, grant tracking, and functional expense allocation independently and without supervision.

 - Experience managing multiple clients simultaneously in an outsourced accounting firm or agency setting. Sequential full-time employer roles are not equivalent.

 - Minimum 12 consecutive months of fully remote, self-directed work with independent deadline management.

 - Advanced proficiency in QuickBooks Online, Xero, Asana, Google Workspace, and Microsoft Office.

 - Professional written and verbal communication in English, including the ability to explain accounting issues clearly to non-accounting clients.

 - Revenue Recognition: Demonstrated ability to apply ASC 606 and ASC 842 standards, specifically managing revenue recognition based on grant documents, funder restrictions, and milestones.

 - Technical Mastery: Deep understanding of U.S.A GAAP and grant compliance standards.

 - Startup Mindset: Ability to context-shift between a variety of clients and thrive in an agile, fast-paced environment. 

 - Experience supporting Form 990 preparation and annual audit coordination.

 - Familiarity with federal, state, or foundation grant compliance reporting requirements.

description:
Who we are:

Proper Printshop is a 15-year-old decorated apparel and fulfillment company based in El Paso, TX. We handle screen printing, DTF, embroidery, and full-service merch programs- company stores, employee uniform portals, onboarding kits, custom packaging, and white-label fulfillment shipped nationwide. Our clients include major universities, professional sports teams, and corporations. We're serious, and we need someone who is too.



What you'll be doing:

- Researching and building targeted prospect lists of companies that fit our fulfillment and company store model

- Cold outreach via
 and LinkedIn- writing sequences that actually get opened and replied to

- Running and managing drip campaigns to nurture leads over time

- Following up relentlessly- most deals don't close on the first touch

- Getting on scheduled Google Meet video calls with warm prospects to pitch and close

- Building accurate quotes for merch programs, kitting, and fulfillment

- Managing your full pipeline in HubSpot CRM- clean, updated, always current

- Tracking jobs and tasks in Printavo once deals move to production (training provided)



What you need:

- Fluent, natural written English- your
s and outreach are your weapon, they have to be sharp

- Real sales instinct- you know how to find the right person, get their attention, and start a conversation

- Experience in B2B outbound sales, business development, or account management

- Comfortable with Google Meet video calls with corporate contacts

- Super-responsive on Google Chat and WhatsApp during US business hours

- Available and on-call 8 AM – 5 PM Mountain Time, Monday through Friday



Big plus:

- Background in apparel, branded merchandise, promotional products, or print

- Experience selling fulfillment, company stores, or subscription-style service programs

- Familiarity with HubSpot, Apollo, or any outbound sales toolstack



Tools you'll use:

- HubSpot CRM

- Gmail

- Google Meet

- Google Chat

- WhatsApp

- Printavo

- LinkedIn



Pay: Base pay- $1,200–$1,500 / month



Commission: Bonus on new accounts closed



Hours: 8 AM–5 PM MT, M–F



Pay is negotiable based on experience. If you're a good fit, we pay well. If you close big accounts, you earn more. We're building something serious here, and we need someone serious with us.



If you're using AI to write your application, at least make it sound like you. We want to hear your voice- not ChatGPT's. Tell us about the biggest deal you ever closed or pursued, what you actually sold, and why you want to work in the merch and fulfillment space. Skip the fluff. Send us the real version of you.

title: HR AND OPERATIONS SUPPORT
description:
I'm looking for a sharp, people-first HR & Recruitment Coordinator who is technically savvy, highly organized, and ready to own this role from day one. This is not a placeholder position — we're building something real and we need someone who wants to be part of it.



---



WHAT THIS ROLE OWNS



- Full recruitment cycle — sourcing, screening, interviewing, and placing top-tier candidates at a high level

- Team compliance tracking — making sure every placed tea
mber meets standards and stays accountable

- Onboarding experience — building and running a structured onboarding process that sets every new hire up to win from day one

- Offboarding & substitution — managing the process of transitioning tea
mbers out cleanly and sourcing qualified substitutes quickly when needed

- HR documentation — maintaining team records, contracts, and internal HR policies in Notion

- Leadership communication — keeping founders informed on pipeline status, team flags, and HR updates proactively

- Culture support — actively contributing to a high-performance internal environment where people feel seen and held to a standard



---



YOU'RE THE RIGHT PERSON IF YOU:



- Have solid corporate HR or recruitment experience — you understand process, compliance, and people at a high level

- Source and recruit exceptionally well — you know how to find the right person, not just any person

- Are highly proficient in Notion — you live in it, you build in it, you organize everything through it

- Have working experience with Claude or other AI tools — and you're genuinely curious about how AI can make your work sharper and faster

- Are technically savvy — you pick up new tools quickly and understand how systems connect inside a growing company

- Communicate proactively — you don't wait to be asked, you update before leadership has to follow up

- Can handle sensitive HR situations — offboarding, substitutions, performance conversations — with professionalism and discretion

- Are looking for a long-term home — not a stepping stone. You want to grow with a company that's building something.

- Actually care about people — not just the paperwork behind them



---



THIS IS NOT FOR YOU IF YOU:



- Need heavy direction to figure out what to do next

- Go quiet when things get complicated or move fast

- See HR as just an administrative function

- Are looking for a short-term role or treating this as a side commitment



TO APPLY



Send your resume + a 1-2self intro. We move fast — if you're the right person, you'll know quickly.

title: Business Intelligence Engineer
description:
**PLEASE ATTACHED YOUR RESUME LINK ON YOUR APPLICATION**



Our client is a U.S.-based professional services firm specializing in integrated project management solutions for the infrastructure and energy sectors. Headquartered in Texas, the company operates across multiple industries, including renewable energy, utilities, oil & gas, and transportation infrastructure. With a strong emphasis on efficiency and technology, they leverage cloud-based systems and enterprise tools to support large-scale field and office operations nationwide.





About the Role

The Business Intelligence Engineer will design and maintain trusted enterprise reporting solutions that support data-driven decision-making across the organization. This role focuses on building scalable Power BI semantic models, standardizing KPI definitions, and delivering clear, reliable dashboards that translate business needs into actionable insights.





Responsibilities:

Design and maintain Power BI semantic models and dashboards used across the organization.

Develop and optimize DAX measures and reporting logic for performance and scalability.

Write and troubleshoot SQL queries to validate and support reporting datasets.

Standardize KPI definitions and metric governance to ensure consistent reporting across teams.

Audit existing dashboards and reports to remove redundancy and improve clarity.

Partner with stakeholders to gather requirements and translate business questions into reporting solutions.

Improve usability and performance through dashboard design and UX optimization.







Competencies and Qualifications:



Must-Have:

5+ years of experience in Business Intelligence or analytics engineering roles.

Strong experience with Power BI semantic model development.

Expertise in DAX development and performance tuning.

Strong SQL querying and data validation skills.

Experience with KPI standardization and metric governance.

Experience designing clear and user-friendly reporting dashboards.

Ability to gather stakeholder requirements and translate them into reporting solutions.

Experience implementing enterprise reporting frameworks.





Nice-to-Have:

Exposure to Microsoft Fabric or modern data platforms.

Experience with data documentation and reporting governance practices.

Microsoft Power BI certification or analytics certifications.

Degree in Data Analytics, Business Intelligence, Computer Science, or related field.





Key Qualities:

Organized – Maintains structured reporting models, datasets, and documentation.

Collaborative – Works closely with stakeholders to align reporting with business needs.

Versatile – Comfortable handling reporting design, data validation, and model optimization.

Decisive – Quickly identifies data issues and determines the best reporting approach.

Goal-Oriented – Focused on delivering insights that support business decisions.

Detail-Oriented – Ensures accuracy and consistency in metrics and dashboards.

Big Picture Thinker – Understands how reporting supports organizational strategy.

Action-Oriented – Proactively improves reporting quality, usability, and adoption.





What We Offer:

100% Remote Work – Work from anywhere in the Philippines.

Career Growth Opportunities – Gain hands-on experience, and continuous learning.

Collaborative & Innovative Team – Work alongside skilled professionals who value excellence

title: Long-Term HubSpot Solutions Architect — Agency Partnership
description:
We're a HubSpot Solutions Partner based in Sydney, Australia. We design and build HubSpot CRM systems, automations, and websites for B2B clients. We're looking for a Solutions Architect to be the technical backbone of our delivery — someone who can take a client brief and design the entire HubSpot solution before a developer touches a single thing.

This is not a VA role. This is not a junior position. You'll be designing the architecture, not executing it.

What You'll Be Doing:



Taking client briefs and translating them into detailed HubSpot solution designs (pipelines, workflows, data models, integration maps)

Defining the technical approach before the build begins — what gets built, how it connects, and in what order

Working directly with me to scope and price projects accurately

QA-ing completed builds to make sure they match the original design

Keeping documentation clean and client-ready at every stage



How We'll Work Together

I'll give you:



Client briefs and discovery call recordings

A dev team who handles the actual build

Clear SOPs and delivery frameworks

Long-term work if you perform well



You'll:



Own the architecture decisions

Flag scope issues before they become problems

Keep documentation clean and up to date

Maintain high standards consistently



Required Experience:



3+ years of hands-on HubSpot experience across Sales Hub, Marketing Hub, CMS, and Operations Hub

You've designed HubSpot solutions from scratch — not just configured what someone else mapped out

Strong understanding of CRM data models: contact properties, pipeline stages, lifecycle stages, association logic

Experience with automation and integration tools — 
, Zapier, or API-based

Strong written English — you'll be reviewing client-facing documents and solution plans



If you've never designed a HubSpot solution end-to-end, this role is not for you.

Nice to Have:



HubSpot certifications

Background in a HubSpot Solutions Partner or digital agency

Familiarity with RevOps or B2B SaaS clients

Experience with HubL or custom CMS modules



Engagement Details:

Full-time | Ongoing | $8/hr

100% remote — must have overlap with AEST (Sydney time)

To Apply:



Brief summary of your HubSpot architecture experience

One specific HubSpot solution you designed — what was the brief, what did you design, and what was the outcome

Examples of solution documentation you've created (flow diagrams, specs, architecture maps)



Applications without HubSpot-specific examples will not be considered.

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Specialist – Automation + Systems Role (Long-Term)
description:
We’re a fast-growing digital marketing agency working with aesthetic clinics and medical spas in Australia.



We’re building a scalable backend system using GoHighLevel and are looking for a GHL specialist to take ownership of it.



Current Situation

We already have the foundation built:

* Pipelines are in place

* Core automations are set up (WhatsApp +
)

* Lead follow-up systems exist

* Onboarding workflows are partially built

* Client snapshot is in progress

This is not a blank build.

What we need now is someone to:

* Refine

* Optimise

* Complete

* And then manage it long-term



Your Role

Phase 1 – System Completion

* Audit the current setup

* Clean up workflows and structure

* Fix inefficiencies and gaps

* Improve speed to lead and follow-up logic

* Finalise onboarding system

* Complete and standardise the client snapshot



Phase 2 – Systems Operator (Long-Term)

Once the system is complete, your role becomes:

* Managing client sub-accounts

* Deploying snapshots for new clients

* Maintaining and improving automations

* Troubleshooting issues

* Supporting pipeline and lead flow

* Helping scale the system as we grow



What We’re Looking For

You must:

* Have real experience with GoHighLevel (not just basic tasks)

* Understand workflows, triggers, pipelines, and automation logic

* Be able to review and improve existing systems

* Think logically and spot inefficiencies

* Communicate clearly and reliably



Non-Negotiables

* Fast and clear communication is critical

* Stable, high-speed internet connection (minimum 50 Mbps)

* Ability to record Loom videos and explain your thinking clearly



This Role Is NOT For You If

* You only follow step-by-step instructions

* You’ve never built or improved a system

* You don’t understand how lead flow and conversion works

* You give generic answers instead of real insights

* You are slow to respond or difficult to communicate with



Bonus If You Have

* Experience with snapshots

* Experience with WhatsApp integrations

* Experience with Zapier or API connections

* Experience in lead generation or marketing systems



Compensation

* Starting rate based on experience

* Increases as responsibility grows

* Long-term opportunity for the right person



Growth Opportunity

We are building a scalable agency model.

The right person will:

* Take ownership of systems

* Become a key part of the business

* Potentially move into a lead systems role



Application Process

1. Apply with:

    * Your experience with GoHighLevel

    * Examples of systems or automations you’ve worked on

    * Your hourly rate

2. Shortlisted candidates will complete a system audit task (Loom video)



Important

To confirm you’ve read this properly:

Start your application with the word “System” and include your internet speed (download/upload).

title: Appointment Setter / Sales Caller (English Speaking, Confident on Phone)
description:
We are looking for a confident and professional appointment setter / live transfer specialist to help handle incoming leads and connect them directly with local business owners. We are a new company looking to grow, and we are excited to find a great long-term fit for this role.



Your main responsibility will be calling new leads as soon as they come in, qualifying them quickly, and then performing a live transfer directly to the business owner so the lead can speak with them immediately.



This role also includes calling local business owners to introduce our service, build interest, and help bring on new partners.



This role requires excellent spoken English, confidence on the phone, and the ability to keep both leads and business owners engaged during conversations.



Responsibilities:



-Call new leads shortly after they come in from ads and landing pages

-Confirm their service needs and location

-Qualify whether they are a good fit for the business owner

-Keep the lead engaged and interested on the phone

-Perform a live transfer directly to the local contractor / business owner

-Call local business owners to introduce our services and build interest

-Help qualify interested business owners as potential partners

-Update lead notes and call status in the CRM (GoHighLevel)

-Follow up on missed calls and voi
s



Requirements:



-Excellent spoken English with clear pronunciation

-Confident, friendly, and professional phone presence

-Comfortable speaking with both leads and business owners

-Experience in appointment setting, call center, or live transfers preferred

-Ability to speak naturally and build quick trust

-Reliable internet and quiet work environment

-Comfortable working inside a CRM (GoHighLevel experience preferred)



Preferred Experience:



-Appointment setting

-Lead qualification

-Call center support

-Live transfer / warm transfer experience

-Phone sales / outreach

-CRM experience (GoHighLevel preferred)



Compensation:



Hourly pay starting at $4/hr + performance bonus based on successful live transfers & closed deals



Please send:



1. A short voice recording introducing yourself

2. Your phone calling experience and why you believe you would be a good fit for this role

3. Your time zone and availability (We are U.S.-based)



Please include #Ave in your application title/subject line.



We look forward to working with you!

title: Remote Office Team | Highly proficient in Excel
description:
Established in 1984, PTFS, LLC is a commercial services company headquartered in Houston TX. Some of our clients have been longstanding customers of ours for over 40 years. We are extremely data driven and we use Excel heavily for most of our company tasks.



We are in process of building a fully remote team in the PH which will eventually take over all US based operations. We are looking for tea
mbers LONG TERM. We value loyalty and tenure-ship and most importantly, availability. We would like all of the tea
mbers we bring onboard to retire with us. We are firm believers that everybody working here deserves the opportunity to grow. Everyone will have a clear understanding of the trajectory of their career path. After 1 year, every tea
mber will go through the process of performance review determining promotion / increase in compensation. The metrics we use are:



- Improved understanding of company processes 

- Thoroughness & speed in taking proper actions 

- Frequency of errors / how individual has corrected them

- New responsibilities assumed since hire

- Dependency & Availability

- Does the individual go above & beyond? 

- Is the individual eager to take the lead in any situation?

- Does the individual possess other skills helpful to the company? 



Our line of work is very fast paced with ever-changing requests from clients. Schedules are set but can change at any given 
nt. It is important for tea
mbers to understand what needs to be done when a sudden change is requested by a customer as there are field workers who are dependent on the office to communicate such changes.  As a tea
mber, we need you to be versatile, stepping up or filling in at any given 
nt if another tea
mber is busy or unavailable. Thus, we don't have a separation of duties. Each tea
mber must be able to do EVERYTHING



If you are interested in applying for this position, please answer the following questions and include your response to your message.



On a scale of 1-10 with 10 being complete mastery and 1 being complete novice, what would you say your proficiency level is with the following:



MS Excel (Overall)

Xlookup & Vlookup

Index & Match

Conditional Formatting

Pivot Tables

Power Query

Data Validation

Macros

Dashboards

Advanced Charting



Please list all other programs, apps, software, technical skills that you have knowledge with followed by - Scale 1-10 proficiency level for each



What is your proficiency in the English language? Scale 1-10

Spoken English

Written English

 Ad Library, keeping track of competitors, and organizing data. The rest of your time will involve building and updating product pages. We will provide full training/SOPs.



I started a year ago, and the business has been growing steadily ever since. We are currently a small team, so by joining us now, you won't just be an employee—you'll be one of the founding members of our team, helping us build the foundation as we continue to scale. We're looking for a RELIABLE, HARD-WORKING, and GENUINE person who can follow instructions carefully and grow with the business LONG-TERM.

mbers

- Good communication skills.

- Proactive! Someone who doesn’t wait to be told what to do.

- Someone who thinks ahead and takes ownership of their work.

- Notion

- Research tools



Other Information:

- Monthly and annual performance bonuses available.

- We aim for a healthy, long-term relationship



TO APPLY:

- Laptop specs / Internet speed screenshots

- Your desired wage/salary and hours.

- Use the subject line: Meticulous Product Researcher - [Your Full name]

- Are you currently working? Why did you leave your last job?

(You can use a Loom link, Google Drive, YouTube unlisted video, etc. Also, feel free to include anything else you’d like to say!)

title: Video Editor / Animator (Part-Time ? Full-Time Opportunity)
description:
Video Editor / Animator (Part-Time ? Full-Time Opportunity)



Type: Part-Time (20 hours per week)

Schedule: Day Shift

Salary: $7 USD per hour (1,212 USD per month) – paid every Friday

Potential: Opportunity to transition to Full-Time



About Us



We are an Australian AI technology company building innovative tools for legal professionals. Our platform helps lawyers work more efficiently using artificial intelligence.



As we continue to grow, we are expanding our video content production to support educational content, product demonstrations, and marketing campaigns. We’re looking for a creative and reliable Video Editor / Animator who can help bring our ideas to life.



Role Overview



As our Video Editor / Animator, you will transform raw footage and concepts into engaging, professional, and visually compelling videos.



You will work closely with our team to produce content for education, marketing, and product storytelling, helping communicate complex ideas in a clear and engaging way.



We have a structured workflow and feedback system in place. Editors will be expected to document feedback and improvements using a checklist system we provide, helping ensure continuous improvement and consistent production quality across projects.



Key Responsibilities



• Edit and enhance raw video footage into polished final videos



• Create engaging narratives through pacing, transitions, and storytelling



• Add graphics, animations, captions, and visual effects where appropriate



• Improve audio quality through noise reduction, music integration, and voiceovers



• Follow editing guidelines and production checklists provided by the team



• Record feedback and improvement notes into the project checklist system



• Organize video files and assets to maintain a clean production workflow



• Collaborate with the team to deliver content aligned with project goals



• Make revisions and improvements based on feedback



Required Skills



• Proven experience as a Video Editor



• Strong portfolio demonstrating editing and storytelling ability



Proficiency in tools such as:



• Adobe Premiere Pro



• After Effects



• Final Cut Pro



• or similar editing software



Strong understanding of:



• Video formats and resolutions



• Export settings and compression



• Audio editing and sound balancing



• Ability to meet deadlines and manage multiple tasks



• Strong attention to detail



Bonus Skills (Nice to Have)



• Motion graphics / animation experience



• Experience creating educational or SaaS product videos



• Familiarity with AI tools for video production



• Basic graphic design skills



What We’re Looking For



We value editors who are:



• Organized and reliable



• Creative but detail-oriented



• Open to structured workflows and feedback



• Interested in long-term collaboration



This position starts part-time, but strong performers may transition to a full-time role as our content production expands.



Application Requirements



To help us evaluate candidates properly, please include the following in your application:



• Your resume



• A short cover letter explaining your video editing experience



• A link to your portfolio showcasing your past work



• Your LinkedIn profile



• Two professional references we may contact



Please ensure your portfolio links can be viewed in an incognito window (without login access)



Additionally, please include the following details:



• Your internet speed (download and upload)



• Your computer specifications (CPU, RAM, GPU)



• Your backup internet options



• Your backup power solution in case of brownouts or outages



How to Apply



To confirm you’ve read this entire job post, please include the word:



"kangaroo"



at the end of your application.



Join our team and help create high-impact video content for the future of AI in the legal industry.

title: Procurement Category Specialist
description:
Procurement Category Specialist

Full-Time | Remote | Australian Mining Company



We are an Australian-based BPO seeking an experienced Procurement Category Specialist to support our client, an Australian mining company.



This is a full-time (FT) role of 40 hours per week, during Australian business hours. Offering the flexibility of working-from-home (WFH) and a competitive salary package + paid leave + bonuses.



This role is responsible for delivering strategic procurement, sourcing, and category management initiatives, ensuring commercial value, supplier performance, and procurement governance. We’re looking for someone analytical, commercially driven, and experienced in managing tenders, contracts, and supplier relationships.



Key Responsibilities Include



Strategic Sourcing & Category Management

• Plan and implement strategic sourcing, category, and supplier management plans

• Align supplier spend with business objectives and KPIs

• Provide procurement insights and category performance reporting



Tendering & Contract Management

• Manage end-to-end tender processes for high-value procurement activities

• Lead contract negotiations including new contracts, renewals, amendments, and extensions

• Work with legal terms to ensure proper governance and compliance



Supplier & Stakeholder Management

• Build and maintain strong relationships with internal stakeholders and suppliers

• Support vendor management and supplier performance initiatives

• Coordinate supplier prequalification and onboarding



Data Analysis & Reporting

• Perform advanced data analysis to support procurement decisions

• Develop and deliver procurement and category reports

• Provide insights on cost, supplier performance, and savings opportunities



Project Procurement Support

• Support project and equipment procurement activities

• Assist with sourcing, supplier selection, and order placement



Systems & Tools You’ll Use

• Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)

• Procurement / Supply Chain Systems

• ERP Systems



***** Key Requirements Include ***** MUST HAVES to apply



• 4–5 years of experience in procurement within mining or heavy industry

• Proven experience in strategic sourcing and category management

• Strong experience managing end-to-end tender processes

• Extensive experience negotiating contracts, renewals, and amendments

• Strong commercial acumen and cost analysis capability

title: Creative Content Creator

title: Digital Marketing Specialist – Ecommerce (Long-Term, Full-Time)
description:
I own an established Australian ecommerce business that manufactures and ships products to customers across Australia, New Zealand, the UK, and the USA. We've been operating for 16 years and have over 50,000 customers.



I'm looking for a skilled Digital Marketing Specialist to take full ownership of our online marketing. This is not a VA role where you'll be doing a bit of everything. This is a dedicated marketing position where you'll own our Google Ads, our Meta advertising, and our digital asset creation.



This is a long-term role with a real business. I'm not looking for someone for a project — I'm looking for someone who wants to grow with us. If you perform well, there is a genuine opportunity to take on more responsibility, manage additional clients, and increase your earnings significantly over time.



Important: Read This Before Applying

I need to be direct about a few things.

Be honest about your skills. If you're excellent at Google Ads but have limited Meta experience, tell me that. If your design skills are stronger than your analytics, say so. I can work with someone who has gaps — I cannot work with someone who pretends they don't.



I have full visibility across every platform. I can see what's been done, what's been changed, and what results came from it. I don't say this to be intimidating — I say it so we start this relationship with complete transparency. Honesty is the most important quality I'm looking for.



How We'll Work Together

Even though you'll be working remotely, you'll be part of our team, not just a freelancer in the background. Here's how we'll stay connected:

You must be contactable at all times during your agreed work hours via Slack, WhatsApp, or similar. If I message you, I expect a response within minutes, not hours.

Weekly Zoo
eting with me and our customer support manager Kara to review progress, discuss the business, and plan ahead.



I will share our business with you through video walkthroughs of our warehouse, products, and operations so you understand what we make, how we ship, and who our customers are. You need to know this business inside out, even from a distance.



Screen sharing and virtual training sessions as needed so we can collaborate on campaigns and strategy in real time.



Monthly reporting — you present your results, what worked, what didn't, and what you want to try next.



This isn't a set-and-forget arrangement. You'll feel like part of the team because you will be part of the team.



What You'll Be Doing

Google Ads (Core Focus):

Manage and optimise Google Ads campaigns (Search, Shopping, Performance Max)

Monitor spend, adjust bids, test ad copy, and improve ROAS

Analyse campaign data and make decisions based on real numbers

Provide clear reporting with actionable recommendations

Meta Advertising 
 & Instagram):

Create, manage, and 
 paid
 and Instagram advertising campaigns

Audience building, retargeting, creative testing, and budget management

Coordinate organic social media content alongside paid campaigns

Digital Asset Creation:

Create social media graphics, ad creatives, banners, and promotional images

Produce visual content for campaigns and promotions

Comfortable with Canva and/or Adobe tools



AI Tools:

I use Claude (by Anthropic) extensively to analyse data, generate content ideas, and solve business problems. I'm looking for someone who either already uses AI tools like Claude, ChatGPT, or similar in their workflow — or is genuinely excited to learn. If you're already using AI to improve your marketing work, tell me about it in your application. This is a genuine advantage.



Reporting:

Monthly report covering traffic, conversions, ad performance, and social growth

Identify what's working, what's not, and what to try next

Be prepared to present and discuss your results on our weekly Zoom call



What I'm Looking For



MUST HAVE:

At least 2 years of hands-on experience managing Google Ads campaigns with real, measurable results

Experience running Meta 
/Instagram) paid advertising

Ability to create digital assets — graphics, ad creatives, social media content



Strong written AND spoken English — you'll be on weekly video calls with us and creating ad copy for an Australian audience

Self-motivated and organised — you manage your own day without being told what to do



Honest and transparent — if you don't know something, say so. If something isn't working, tell me before I find out myself



Reliable internet connection, webcam, and a quiet workspace for video calls

Available Monday to Thursday, with hours overlapping Australian business hours (AEST)



Contactable during work hours — responsive on messaging platforms



NICE TO HAVE:

Experience with BigCommerce or Shopify

Understanding of SEO and Google Search Console

Experience using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, etc.) for marketing or data analysis

Experience with Google Analytics 4

Experience working with ecommerce or physical product businesses

Experience working with Australian businesses

Personal interest in backyard chickens, poultry keeping, or small-scale farming — our customers are passionate about their flocks, and understanding that world makes a real difference to the quality of content and campaigns you'll produce

How to Apply

Do NOT send me a generic application. I will ignore it.

Answer these five questions:

Show me a Google Ads campaign you managed. What was the business, what did you do, and what were the results? Include real numbers. If you also have Meta Ads results to share, include those too.

If I gave you access to an ecommerce store with 50,000 customers, declining traffic, and a Google Ads account that needs work — what would you do in your first 30 days? Be specific.

What digital assets have you created? Send me examples — ad creatives, social media graphics, banners, anything. A portfolio link or screenshots are fine.

Be honest: what are you strongest at, and where are your gaps? I'd rather know now than find out later.

Do you have any personal experience with backyard chickens, poultry, or small-scale farming? This isn't a dealbreaker, but it's a genuine advantage for this role.

If you answer these five questions well and honestly, you'll get a video interview. If you send me a copy-paste application, you won't hear back.

This is a genuine long-term opportunity with a real business that's been running for 16 years. I'm looking for someone who wants to be part of building something — not just doing tasks.

 and Communications:

 inboxes, flagging urgent items and drafting routine responses.

What We Are Looking For:

Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook) and Google Suite.

What is your favourite food?

Part-time, 20 hours per week, with potential to grow to full-time.

Competitive part-time salary commensurate with experience.

13th month bonus.

A supportive, small-team environment where your work has direct impact.



How to Apply:

In your cover letter, tell us about a time you managed multiple tasks or priorities at once and how you handled it. Please also include a short Loom video introduction, no more than 2 minutes, telling us a bit about yourself, your experience, and why you are interested in this role. This role focuses on creating Instagram stories, thumbnails, and feed graphics for multiple brands, including med spas, plastic surgeons, hair restoration clinics, dermatology practices, real estate brands, barbers, nail technicians, and more.

This position is not focused on heavy video editing. The priority is strong visual design, creativity, and the ability to consistently produce high-quality content at scale.

-Strong understanding of Instagram layouts, trends, and visual storytelling

-Ability to work efficiently under daily production demands

-Creative, reliable, and detail-oriented

-Must be able to work on Pacific Standard Time (PST) schedule



Position Details

-40 hours per week

-Monday through Friday

-9:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST

-Long-term position with strong growth opportunities as the company scales

-Your portfolio

-Examples of Instagram stories, thumbnails, or feed posts

-A brief explanation of your experience with AI image generation

?? Applications that do not include all of the above will not be reviewed.

title: Social Media Marketing & Viral Script Expert
description:
Here's the complete, final job post with everything included:



---



**Job Title:** Social Media Manager – Instagram Growth Specialist (Cleaning Industry)



**Job Type:** Full-Time | Remote | Long-Term Opportunity



---



**About Us**



Greater Phoenix Cleaning is a premium residential, commercial, Airbnb turnover, and post-construction cleaning company serving the Greater Phoenix, Arizona area. We are on a mission to become the most recognized and trusted cleaning brand in Phoenix — and we need a social media powerhouse to help us get there.



We don't just clean homes. We give busy professionals and upper-middle-class families their time back. That's our brand. That's our promise.



---



**The Role**



We are looking for a Social Media Manager who is genuinely **obsessed** with Instagram and social media growth. This is not a part-time hobby — this is a full-time commitment to building a dominant online presence for our brand in the Greater Phoenix market.



You will be responsible for **6 high-quality posts per day, 7 days per week** across our Instagram account. Every single post must deliver real value, reflect current algorithm trends, and speak directly to our ideal customer and our ideal tea
mber.



---



**What You'll Be Posting About**



Content should rotate across the following pillars:



- Cleaning tips, techniques, and best practices for residential homes

- Commercial cleaning insights and standards

- Airbnb and short-term rental turnover strategies

- Post-construction cleanup processes and safety

- Health awareness — allergens, dust, mold, VOCs, and air quality

- Product education — what works, what's safe, what's most effective

- Industry trends and innovations in the cleaning world

- Recruitment content targeting experienced, professional cleaners in the Phoenix area who want to earn serious income

- Trust-building and authority content positioning Greater Phoenix Cleaning as the **#1 go-to cleaning company** in the area



---



**Your Primary Goals**



1. **Attract the Ideal Customer** — Upper-middle-class homeowners, busy professionals, real estate investors, and Airbnb hosts in the Greater Phoenix area who value their time and want premium, reliable cleaning services

2. **Attract A-Player Cleaning Professionals** — Experienced cleaners in the Phoenix area looking for a company that will pay well and treat them right

3. **Build Omnipresence** — We want Greater Phoenix Cleaning to be *everywhere* in the Phoenix market online



---



**What We're Looking For**



- Proven experience growing Instagram accounts — **you must provide examples of previous clients you have helped grow or go viral**

- Deep understanding of the Instagram algorithm and how it evolves — you study this constantly

- Ability to create or direct the creation of high-quality, visually compelling content (Reels, carousels, static posts, Stories)

- Strong English copywriting skills — captions must be engaging, clear, and on-brand

- Ability to research and translate cleaning industry topics into educational, shareable content

- Self-motivated and consistent — 6 posts per day, 7 days per week, no exceptions

- Experience with content scheduling tools (Later, Buffer, Meta Business Suite, etc.)

- Understanding of hashtag strategy, SEO for Instagram, and engagement tactics



---



**Nice to Have**



- Experience with video editing (CapCut, Premiere, or similar)

- Experience growing local service business accounts

- Familiarity with Canva or Adobe tools for graphics

- Experience with short-form video (Reels)



---



**What We Offer**



- Competitive base pay (based on experience and proven results)

- **Performance incentive pay** — bonuses for new clients and new cleaning tea
mbers that join as a direct result of social media efforts

- Long-term role for the right candidate — we want someone who grows with us

- The chance to build something real and become the social media architect behind one of Phoenix's top cleaning brands



---



**How to Apply**



Please submit the following:



1. A short introduction about yourself and your social media background

2. **Links to 2–3 Instagram accounts you have managed** — show us growth, viral content, or engagement results

3. Your proposed content strategy or content pillars for a cleaning company Instagram page

4. Your availability and rate expectation

5. **A 2–3 minute personalized Loom video addressed directly to Ross** — introduce yourself, tell us why you're the absolute best fit for **Greater Phoenix Cleaning**, and show us your personality. Generic videos will be disqualified. Make it count.



**Applications without a portfolio AND a Loom video will not be considered.**



---



We're building something big in Phoenix. If you're the kind of person who wakes up thinking about content, studies the algorithm for fun, and has a track record of making brands impossible to ignore — we want to talk.

title: Cold Call Manager / QA-QC & Lead Qualification Manager (Real Estate) – Full-Time
description:
Cold Call Manager / QA-QC & Lead Qualification Manager (Real Estate) – Full-Time



Job Type

Full-Time (Remote / Virtual)

Industry: Real Estate Acquisitions / Lead Generation



Position Overview



We are hiring a full-time Cold Call Manager to oversee our real estate cold-calling operation, manage caller performance, handle QA/QC, and improve lead qualification quality before leads are passed to acquisitions.



This role requires someone who is strong at listening to calls, understanding tone, coaching callers, and identifying where deals are being missed — especially on calls marked as “unqualified” that may actually deserve follow-up.



The ideal candidate has hands-on experience with ReadyModeIQ (ReadyMode), understands dialer management, and knows how to improve both team output and lead quality in a real estate environment.



Core Responsibilities



1) Cold Caller Team Management (Daily)

-Manage and supervise cold callers (full-time / part-time / VA team)

-Track daily performance metrics (dials, connects, conversations, outcomes, appointments)

-Ensure callers followscript, workflow, and disposition standards

-Run daily check-ins, feedback sessions, and performance huddles

-Monitor attendance, consistency, and productivity

-Assign call lists and priorities based on campaign goals

-Payroll



2) QA/QC (Quality Assurance / Quality Control)

-Review and score call recordings for:

-Script adherence

-Professionalism

-Clarity

-Confidence

-Tone and communication style

-Objection handling

-Accuracy of dispositions / call outcomes

-Provide coaching feedback to improve conversion and caller effectiveness

-Identify weak patterns (rushing, poor tone, bad transitions, missed qualifying questions, etc.)

-Maintain and improve QA scorecards and call standards

-Audit CRM notes/tags for accuracy and completeness



3) Unqualified Lead Call Review (Critical)

-Listen to calls marked as “unqualified” to verify whether they were truly unqualified

-Catch missed opportunities caused by:

-Poor caller tone

-Weak follow-up questions

-Incorrect dispositioning

-Failure to build rapport

-Missed seller motivation signals

-Reclassify leads when needed (nurture / warm / follow-up / manager review)

-Coach callers on how to better handle similar situations going forward

-Build a feedback loop to reduce false disqualifications and improve lead quality



4) Lead Qualification & Handoff Control

-Review and qualify leads before they are sent to acquisitions

-Confirm key data points such as:

-Property address

-Seller / decision-maker contact info

-Motivation

-Timeline

-Property condition (if available)

-Price expectation / asking range (if available)

-Occupancy / vacancy

-Best callback time / next step

-Organize leads by status (hot / warm / nurture / disqualified)

-Make manager-level follow-up qualification calls when needed

-Ensure acquisitions receives clean, accurate, actionable lead handoffs



5) ReadyModeIQ / Dialer Management

-Manage and monitor ReadyModeIQ / ReadyMode dialer operations

-Ensure campaigns, caller sessions, and workflows are running correctly

-Troubleshoot dialer-related issues (call flow, agent statuses, campaign setup, etc.)

-Help maintain dialing efficiency while preserving call quality

-Support list loading / campaign organization (as needed)

-Coordinate with leadership on dialing strategy, productivity, and performance optimization



6) Training, Coaching & Process Improvement

-Train new callers on script, tone, qualification, dispositions, and CRM process

-Run roleplays focused on rapport, objection handling, and confidence

-Coach callers on how they sound, not just what they say

-Improve call scripts and qualification flow based on call review trends

-Maintain SOPs for call handling, QA, and lead handoff standards



Required Qualifications



-Proven experience managing cold callers / appointment setters / inside sales teams

-Experience in real estate lead generation (investor, wholesale, acquisitions, brokerage, etc.)

-Strong experience with QA/QC call review and coaching

-Strong ability to evaluate tone, communication style, and seller interaction quality

-Experience reviewing calls marked “unqualified” and identifying missed opportunities

-Hands-on experience with ReadyModeIQ / ReadyMode

-Experience managing a dialer and monitoring caller performance

-Strong understanding of lead qualification and seller motivation

-Strong organization, follow-through, and accountability management

-Experience with CRM systems and accurate lead dispositioning



Preferred Qualifications (Strong Plus)



-Experience in real estate investing (wholesale, fix & flip, novation, seller finance, etc.)

-Experience managing remote teams / overseas callers / VAs

-Experience building QA scorecards and coaching systems

-Familiarity with list stacking, skip tracing, and campaign segmentation

-Ability to pull insights from call recordings and improve scripts/process quickly



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)



-Team call consistency and productivity

-Call quality scores (QA/QC)

-Tone/communication improvement across callers

-Lead qualification accuracy

-Reduction in false “unqualified” dispositions

-Number of qualified leads passed to acquisitions

-CRM note/tag accuracy

-Caller coaching progress and performance improvement

-Dialer uptime / campaign efficiency (ReadyModeIQ)



What Success Looks Like in This Role



-Callers sound professional, confident, and consistent

-Fewer good leads are lost due to poor tone or bad qualification

-“Unqualified” leads are properly audited and corrected when needed

-Acquisitions receives stronger, cleaner lead handoffs

-QA/QC and dialer management are organized, consistent, and scalable



Schedule / Availability



-Full-time remote role

-Must be available during core calling hours for target markets

-Daily communication with leadership and acquisitions team required

-Fast response time for caller issues, dialer problems, and lead review needs



Compensation (Example Language)



Compensation based on experience and results. Can include:

-Base salary or hourly (full-time)

-Performance incentives tied to:

-Team qualified leads

-QA performance

-Lead quality improvement

-Reduction in bad / missed lead dispositions

title: Video Editor- YouTube Long Form and Instagram Reels
description:
Hi everyone,

I am looking for a Video Editor who lives and breathes YouTube long form and Instagram Reels.

Not commercials/documentary/wedding etc etc

 YouTube & IG — specifically talking head content that feels dynamic, well-paced, and holds attention without relying on gimmicks.



---



WHAT YOU'LL BE EDITING



- Long form talking head videos (15 mins to 60+ mins, occasionally longer)

- Short form vertical content for Instagram Reels 

- Occasional video carousels



Footage will be clean, well-lit, main camera talking head, with some occasional b-roll of top-down shots on a desk. Audio will come with the video footage.

Your job is pacing, cuts, supers/text animations, music, SFX, and making the whole thing feel alive without it feeling overproduced.



You won't be receiving raw unedited footage. Before anything reaches you, I'll have already removed bad takes, fluff, pauses and wrong lines in Riverside — so what you get is essentially a clean assembly cut aligned to the script. Your job starts from there: pacing, energy, supers, music, SFX, transitions.



---



WHAT I'M LOOKING FOR



- Proven YouTube editing experience — show me channels you've edited, not just a showreel

- Strong sense of pacing for talking head content — you know when to cut, when to hold, when a pause is doing the work

- Comfortable with text animations and supers — we'll have a template but you need to be able to work within it and occasionally adapt it

- Music and SFX selection — you have an ear for it

- Able to edit short form vertical with more dynamic cuts

- Premiere Pro preferred

- Fast turnaround and clear communication — I work to a publishing schedule and I need reliability above all else

- Comfortable receiving clean assembly cuts via Riverside or standard export formats — no raw footage wrangling required.



---



NICE TO HAVE



- Experience with Opus Clip or similar AI clipping tools

- Familiarity with educational or interview-style YouTube content

- Basic motion graphics capability beyond text templates



---



HOW TO APPLY



Send me:

1. Some links of long/short form videos you edited

2. Your rate: Preferably a flat fee, I'm working toward one long form + 14 shorts per fortnight per fortnight (Considering that half of the shorts will be clipped from the long form. So this will be ongoing for the right fit. But if you prefer to keep the rate per video, feel free to share the long form rate and the shorts too.

title: Procurement Officer
description:
Admin & Recruitment Support Specialist

Full-Time | Remote | Australian Recruitment Company



We are an Australian-based BPO seeking an experienced Procurement Officer to support our client, an Australian mining company.



This is a full-time (FT) role of 40 hours per week, during Australian business hours. Offering the flexibility of working-from-home (WFH) and a competitive salary package + paid leave + bonuses.



This role is responsible for delivering a comprehensive and value-driven approach to procurement and contract management, supporting operations and projects. We’re looking for someone highly organized, detail-oriented, and confident working across suppliers, logistics, and internal stakeholders.



Key Responsibilities Include



Procurement & Contract Management

• Prepare and issue tender documentation, RFQs, and purchase orders for high value/high risk items

• Conduct commercial and technical evaluation of supplier bids

• Ensure purchase orders comply with specifications and requirements

• Identify and recommend procurement strategies to reduce costs without compromising quality

• Ensure timely purchasing commitments aligned with operational needs

• Support contract management and procurement lifecycle activities



Supplier & Stakeholder Management

• Build and maintain strong relationships with suppliers and internal stakeholders

• Develop strong knowledge of supplier capabilities and market options

• Coordinate with suppliers for timely delivery of materials and spare parts

• Attend material status meetings and provide updates on outstanding orders

• Liaise with internal teams to align procurement priorities



Logistics & Expediting
