title: DTC Growth Marketer
description:
ABOUT THE OPPORTUNITY

We're looking for a hands-on DTC Growth Marketer who will own the full performance marketing stack for a multi-brand premium bedding company selling direct-to-consumer via Shopify. This is not a "manage the agency" role — you will be in the ad accounts daily, making optimization decisions, and directly accountable for CAC, ROAS, and revenue growth.



We're a US-based e-commerce company generating $12M+/year across Amazon, Walmart, and TikTok Shop. Our DTC channel is early-stage (~$19K/month) with massive upside. You will be the person who scales it.



You'll work alongside an AI operations agent that handles analytics, reporting, competitor intelligence, and strategic specs. Your job is execution: turning data-driven strategies into live, profitable campaigns and conversion improvements.



ABOUT INSPIRATEK

About Us

Inspiratek LLC is a US-based e-commerce company generating $18M+ annually on Amazon, with expanding presence on TikTok Shop and DTC Shopify. We operate 5 private label brands with 20+ active products across the portfolio.

What makes us different: we're building one of the most data-driven operations in the private label space. Our team uses advanced analytics, AI-powered operational agents, custom data pipelines, and structured decision frameworks to manage every aspect of the business , from keyword-level PPC decisions to inventory forecasting to competitive intelligence. This isn't a company where you'll be making gut calls. Every decision is backed by data, and every action plan has measurable outcomes.

We're a 27-person distributed team across the world. We operate in a fast-paced, high-autonomy environment where ownership and accountability matter more than hours logged.

Our DTC channel is our strategic growth priority for
. We're building it from the ground up with the right team — not rushing to throw money at ads, but systematically constructing a profitable, data-driven growth engine.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN



Paid Media (Meta + Google) — 50% of your time

• Manage $3K–$15K/month ad spend across Meta Ads and Google Ads (Shopping, Search, PMAX)

• Build and test full-funnel campaigns: awareness ? consideration ? conversion

• Launch 5-10 new creative concepts per month (you brief the concepts, production team builds assets)

• Maintain blended ROAS above 2x (target 3x+), with CAC below $15

• Weekly creative testing: hook variations, UGC vs. static, format experiments

• Real-time optimization: pause underperformers within 48 hours, scale winners with controlled budget increases

• Platform-specific strategy: understand why Meta creative fatigue differs from Google Shopping bid dynamics



CRO & Funnel Optimization — 25% of your time

• Own the conversion funnel: sessions ? PDP view ? add-to-cart ? checkout ? purchase

• Run A/B tests on product pages, landing pages, checkout flow, and trust signals

• Diagnose conversion drops using Shopify Analytics + Microsoft Clarity heatmaps

• Implement and monitor trust-building elements: reviews, guarantees, social proof, comparison tables

• Mobile-first optimization (79% of our traffic is mobile, currently converting at 1.7% vs. desktop 2.2%)

• Target: move store-wide conversion rate from ~1.8% to 2.5%+ within 6 months



 & Retention Support — 15% of your time

• Collaborate with
 specialist (Klaviyo) on campaign strategy and list growth

• Own the connection between paid acquisition and
 capture (popup optimization, lead magnets)

• Monitor LTV:CAC ratio and repeat purchase rates

• Contribute to post-purchase flow strategy (cross-sell timing, winback triggers)



Reporting & Strategy — 10% of your time

• Weekly performance report: spend, revenue, ROAS, CAC, CVR, AOV with WoW comparison

• Monthly channel P&L with contribution margin analysis

• Proactive identification of scaling opportunities and risks

• Work with the AI operations agent to translate analytics into action



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE (90-DAY SCORECARD)

Month 1 — Foundation

? Full audit of existing Meta + Google Ads accounts completed

? Underperforming campaigns paused, winning audiences/creatives identified

? First 3 creative test concepts launched

? Baseline conversion funnel mapped with drop-off points identified

? Weekly reporting cadence established



Month 2 — Traction

? Meta ROAS above 1.5x (from current 0.98x)

? At least 2 winning ad sets identified and scaling

? First CRO test completed (PDP or landing page)

?
 capture rate improvement measured

? Google Ads Shopping campaigns live and indexed



Month 3 — Scale

? Blended ROAS above 2x

? CAC trending below $20 (toward $15 target)

? Store-wide conversion rate improved 0.3pp+ from baseline

? Proven creative testing velocity: 5+ new concepts per month

? DTC revenue trajectory toward $25K+/month



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Must-Have Experience (Non-Negotiable):

• 3+ years managing paid media for DTC/Shopify brands (not just Amazon PPC or agency reporting)

• Hands-on Meta Ads experience: $3K-$50K/month spend, profitable ROAS track record

• Google Ads experience: Shopping, Search, and/or Performance Max campaigns

• Demonstrable results: show us before/after ROAS, CAC, or revenue numbers from a past DTC brand

• Conversion rate optimization: you've improved CVR on product pages or landing pages with data to prove it

• Proficiency with: Meta Business Manager, Google Ads Manager, Google Analytics (GA4), Shopify Analytics

• Strong analytical skills: can calculate ROAS, CAC, LTV, MER, contribution margin without a calculator app

• English fluency: written and verbal, sufficient for creative briefs and strategic communication



Strong Preferences:

• Experience with premium/lifestyle brands (home, bedding, wellness, beauty)

• Klaviyo or
 marketing platform experience

• A/B testing methodology (not just "we tried something" — structured hypothesis ? test ? result)

• Microsoft Clarity, Hotjar, or similar behavioral analytics tools

• Understanding of attribution challenges (platform-reported vs. actual ROAS discrepancy)



Nice-to-Have:

• Experience with Triple Whale, Northbeam, or post-purchase survey attribution

• Shopify theme editing or basic Liquid knowledge

• Video ad editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, etc.)

• Experience in a company running both Amazon + DTC simultaneously (cross-channel dynamics)









WHAT WE PROVIDE

• AI-powered analytics: Our operations agent delivers daily dashboards, competitor intel, creative diagnosis reports, and strategic specs — you execute against clear, data-backed recommendations

• Existing infrastructure: Shopify store live, Meta + Google Ads accounts active, Klaviyo flows built, GA4 configured, competitor tracking system running

• Creative support: Content production team available for ad asset creation from your briefs

• Clear KPIs: No ambiguity about what success looks like — CAC, ROAS, CVR, revenue targets are defined

• Strategic documents: 17 strategic specs already built (creative briefs, PDP optimization specs, funnel analysis,
 flow architecture) — you inherit a playbook, not a blank page

• Growth trajectory: This is a ground-floor DTC buildout for a $12M+ company — the upside for career growth is significant



DEAL-BREAKERS — DO NOT APPLY IF:

? Your experience is primarily Amazon PPC (Sponsored Products/Brands/Display) — DTC paid media is fundamentally different

? You've only worked agency-side reviewing dashboards, not in-platform making daily optimization decisions

? You can't show concrete before/after metrics from a DTC brand you personally managed

? You're looking for a strategy-only role — this is 80% execution, 20% strategy

? You need constant direction — we want someone who sees a 0.98x ROAS and immediately knows the first 5 things to investigate



APPLICATION PROCESS

Send your cover letter to 
 using this subject line format:

Full Name - Country - DTC Growth Manager - Source

(e.g., Jane Doe - United States - DTC Growth Manager - LinkedIn)

Applications that do not follow this subject line format will not be processed.

Your application MUST include:

1. Resume/CV

2. A brief case study (1 page max): One DTC brand you managed paid media for. Include: starting metrics, what you did, ending metrics, and timeframe.

3. Answer this question (3–5 sentences): "If you saw a Meta Ads account with 13 ad sets, $6,500 monthly spend, and 0.98x blended ROAS, what are the first 3 things you would do?"



Applications without the case study and question answer will not be reviewed.



We review applications within 5 business days. Qualified candidates will receive the Skill Assessment Test (45-60 minutes) before the interview stage.

title: Website Creator and Data Entry
description:
We are seeking a skilled website creator to develop a simple, efficient web platform for managing field inspection data. The ideal candidate will be responsible for the following:

Website Development: Build a user-friendly website where field inspectors can log in and submit inspection reports. The site should have a simple interface for data entry, including fields for site details, inspection results, photos, and signatures.

Database Management: Design and implement a secure database to store all inspection data. The system should allow for easy retrieval, filtering, and export of reports.

User Accounts: Set up a basic user management system for different levels of access (e.g., inspectors, managers).

Data Entry (Initial Phase): Assist with initial data entry to populate the system with existing site information.

Training & Support: Provide brief training materials or a quick tutorial for field inspectors on how to use the new system and offer limited post-launch support.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
About Sandwicheez

Sandwicheez is a fast-growing San Francisco sandwich chain serving high-quality food in the US. 

We’re hiring a creative, fast-moving Social Media Manager to grow an exciting, fast-growing sandwich brand. You’ll create engaging TikTok and Instagram content, drive audience growth, and turn everyday moments into craveable stories that boost engagement, brand awareness, and real customer traffic.



The Role

We need a creative, growth-obsessed Social Media Manager to turn raw footage from our California shops into viral, search-optimized masterpieces. You are the director—you scout the trends and tell our US-based team exactly what to film.

What You’ll Do

• Content Creation: Plan, script, and edit high-performing TikToks and Reels that hook viewers in 2 seconds.

• Trends: Identify trends in the sandwich and food market and "translate" them for an audience in the US.

• Social SEO: Perform research and write keyword-rich captions to make us the #.

• Graphic Design: Use Canva to design menus, promos, and local event posts.

• Engagement: Manage comments and DMs to build a real community.

Who You Are

• Experienced: 3–6 years managing social for brands (Food/Restaurant is a huge plus) and a graduate with a degree, but preferably related to business and marketing

• Platform Native: You deeply understand TikTok/IG culture and US consumer nuances.

• Fast: You execute quickly without overthinking. We value speed + quality.

• Storyteller: You know a "sandwich build" isn't just food—it's ASMR (Autonomous Sensory Meridian Response), texture, and craving.



Battle-Ready Setup

• PC/Laptop: Min i5 / 8GB RAM (capable of video editing).

• Internet: Reliable 25 Mbps + Backup (Pocket Wi-Fi).

• Power: UPS/Power station backup.

• Schedule: Must have at least 4 hours overlap with Pacific Time (California).

title: Xactimate Estimator / Insurance Restoration Estimator (Full-Time, Remote)

About Us



We are a fast-growing U.S.-based company specializing in home services (roofing, solar, and restoration). We support sales teams and contractors by providing accurate estimates, strong backend operations, and high-performance systems.



We are looking for a high-quality estimator who understands insurance-based projects and can produce clean, accurate estimates quickly.

You will be responsible for creating detailed, insurance-compliant estimates using Xactimate. You will work closely with our internal team to scope projects, build estimates, and support revisions/supplements.



This is a high-impact role where accuracy and speed directly affect revenue.



Key Responsibilities

Bonus Qualifications (Highly Preferred)

-Experience with PlanSwift and/or Bluebeam

-Background in construction, engineering, or quantity surveying

-Experience with insurance claims and supplements

-Roofing, solar, or restoration industry experience



What We’re Looking For

-Detail-oriented and accurate

-Fast turnaround without sacrificing quality

-Able to follow systems and processes

-Coachable and willing to improve

-Long-term team player



Compensation & Growth

-Competitive base salary based on experience

-Stable, long-term role with a growing company

title: URGENT HIRING: Social Media Manager (Viral Content & Growth)
description:
We’re looking for a social media native to help manage and scale accounts that generate millions of views every month.



This isn’t a basic “schedule posts and log off” role. It’s for someone who genuinely understands the internet — someone who notices trends early, understands why content performs, and enjoys turning good posts into great ones that reach massive audiences.



If you’re the type of person who scrolls social media and naturally analyzes why something went viral, you’ll feel right at home here.



This is a great opportunity for someone who wants real experience managing high-performing social media accounts, learning viral content strategy, and building a long-term career in the social media and creator economy.



What You’ll Be Doing:



You’ll help manage and optimize multiple social media pages by posting content, monitoring performance, and making smart decisions based on trends and engagement.



Your work will involve researching short-form content trends, reviewing how posts perform, spotting opportunities to improve results, and applying feedback to help our pages continue growing.



You’ll also learn our internal workflows and strategies that help our content consistently reach large audiences.





We’re looking for someone who is:



• Highly reliable and organized

• Comfortable working independently in a remote environment

• Detail-oriented with strong visual judgment

• Naturally curious about why content goes viral

• Familiar with social media trends, formats, and internet culture

• Fluent in English and able to communicate clearly

• Open to feedback and eager to improve



Gen Z applicants or those deeply familiar with Gen Z internet culture are strongly encouraged to apply, but this is not a requirement.



Experience is helpful, but passion, instincts, and work ethic matter more than formal background.



Why This Role Is a Great Opportunity



• Fully remote work

• Paid training and ongoing mentorship

• Performance-based bonuses

• Work on social media accounts that reach millions of views

• Clear path for growth into higher-level social media or strategy roles

• Supportive team environment with no micromanagement



How to Apply



Please submit the following:



1?? A portfolio or examples of content you’ve worked on (personal projects are welcome)

2?? A 1–2 minute video introduction explaining why you’d be a great fit



Your
 subject line should be: SUPERSTAR SMM



!!!! Important !!!!

• No video introduction = automatic rejection

• Incorrect subject line = automatic rejection



We’re looking for people who bring creativity, curiosity, and strong work ethic — not copy-paste applications.



If social media is something you genuinely enjoy and want to turn into a long-term career, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Procurement Admin
description:
Procurement Admin

Full-Time | Remote | Australian Mining Company



We are an Australian-based BPO seeking an experienced Procurement Admin to support our client, an Australian mining company.



This is a full-time (FT) role of 40 hours per week, during Australian business hours. Offering the flexibility of working-from-home (WFH) and a competitive salary package + paid leave + bonuses.



This role is responsible for providing day-to-day procurement and administrative support, ensuring smooth purchasing operations, inventory coordination, and office administration. We’re looking for someone highly organized, detail-oriented, and capable of supporting procurement and admin functions in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities Include



Procurement Support

• Prepare and issue price enquiries and purchase orders for stock items, office consumables, and supplies

• Review and process purchase requisitions and approvals

• Ensure timely purchasing commitments to meet operational requirements

• Assist in cost tracking and identifying opportunities to reduce expenditure



Order Expediting & Coordination

• Expedite orders to ensure on-time delivery

• Coordinate with suppliers to track and manage orders

• Ensure timely delivery of goods to support office and operations



Fuel Management & Data Tracking

• Manage fuel-related data entry and tracking

• Perform POD (Proof of Delivery) checking and goods receipt

• Identify and resolve discrepancies in deliveries and records



Administration & Office Support

• Provide general office admin and receptionist support

• Assist tea
mbers with administrative tasks as needed

• Maintain organized records and documentation



Reporting & Communication

• Prepare accurate and professional reports

• Maintain strong attention to detail across all tasks

• Draft bilingual reports (English/Mandarin) where required

• Communicate effectively with internal teams and external stakeholders



Systems & Tools You’ll Use

• Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)

• Procurement / Supply Chain Systems

• ERP Systems



***** Key Requirements Include ***** MUST HAVES to apply



• Proven experience in procurement admin or general admin support

• Year 12 certificate or above (minimum requirement)

• Experience handling purchase orders, requisitions, and supplier coordination

• Experience in procurement, inventory, or supply chain support

• Experience in mining, construction, or similar industries

• Familiarity with logistics and supplier coordination

• Bilingual in English and Mandarin (written and spoken)



IDEAL CANDIDATES have

• Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

• Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines

• Strong verbal and written communication skills

• Proficiency in Microsoft Office and procurement/supply chain systems

• Strong problem-solving and coordination skills



Important – How To Apply



To be considered, please follow these instructions:



Link your CV for us to review.

*****Important – How To Apply*****



To be considered, please follow these instructions:

1. Link your CV for us to review.

2. Provide an overview of your WFH set-up. ( You must have your own work device, fast and reliable internet, back-up internet and power options, co-working space/internet cafe within 20 minutes travel time).

3. Provide a short outline of your experience in recruitment/ admin support/ compliance.

4. List the systems/tools you’ve used

5. Provide a short video/voice introduction to yourself.



Applications that do not follow instructions may not be reviewed.



Thank you

title: Graphic Designer + Content Creator / Wellness Agency
description:
About Us:

The Coupet Collective is a boutique digital marketing agency based in the U.S. that works exclusively with wellness brands — compounding pharmacies, telehealth companies, medspas, fitness tech, supplement brands, and mental health platforms. We’re a small, tight-knit creative team that values high-quality design, clear communication, and real ownership of your work.



We’re looking for a talented Graphic Designer / Content Creator to join us part-time and work directly under our CEO and Lead Brand & Content Strategist. This is a hands-on creative production role — you’ll be executing design projects across multiple wellness clients, not managing strategy. If you love clean, modern design and thrive with clear direction, keep reading.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Designing branded social media graphics (Instagram,
, LinkedIn, TikTok) — static posts, carousels, stories, and short-form video cover images

Creating marketing collateral: one-pagers, sell sheets, PDFs, flyers, and digital brochures

Designing
 graphics and layouts for campaigns and newsletters

Building and formatting presentation decks and client-facing documents

Adapting and resizing assets across platforms and formats

Laying out branded content using established brand guidelines, color palettes, and font systems

Supporting content calendar production by designing batched assets on a weekly basis

Light photo editing and mockup creation as needed

Organizing and maintaining design files in shared folders



What We’re Looking For:

-Required-

Strong proficiency in Canva Pro — this is our primary design tool; you must be advanced, not just familiar

A polished portfolio that demonstrates range: social media content, branded PDFs,
 design, and marketing materials

Clean, modern design sensibility — we lean minimal, editorial, and elevated (not cluttered or over-templated)

Strong typography and layout skills

Ability to follow brand guidelines precisely while still bringing creative ideas to the table

Clear, responsive communication in written English

Reliable internet connection and a distraction-free workspace

Availability to overlap with U.S. Pacific Time for check-ins and feedback



Nice to Have:

Experience designing for wellness, health, beauty, or pharmaceutical brands

Familiarity with Metricool, Later, or other social media scheduling platforms

Basic video editing or motion graphics skills (CapCut, Adobe Premiere, After Effects)

Understanding of social media design best practices: safe zones, aspect ratios, platform specs





Compensation & Growth

This role starts at $7 USD/hour at 8 hours per week. The rate and hours are set — please only apply if you’re comfortable with this structure. That said, we’re actively building our team, and this role is genuinely designed to grow. The right person will have the opportunity to take on more hours, more responsibility, and higher pay as TCC scales.





About the Role

You’ll report directly to our CEO and Lead Brand Strategist. We’ll provide clear briefs, brand assets, and direction — your job is to execute beautifully and efficiently. We move fast, give clear feedback, and respect your time.



A typical week might look like:

Receive a batch brief for a client’s weekly social content (6–10 graphics)

Design a branded PDF or one-pager for a new product or campaign

Create
 graphics for a client newsletter

Resize and adapt existing assets for different platforms

Make revisions based on feedback (usually 1–2 rounds)

Organize and upload final files to shared folders





How to Apply:

Please include the following in your application:



- Your Portfolio



- Include the word “WELLNESS” at the top of your application so we know you read the full posting.

description:

title: Project Controller – Remote
description:
We are looking for a Project Controller to support cost control and project delivery across mining and EPCM projects. The role involves tracking budgets, monitoring project progress, managing resource utilisation, and preparing weekly and monthly reports. You will work closely with Project Managers to support forecasting, financial tracking, and overall project performance.



The ideal candidate has 4–8 years of experience in project controls or a similar role, preferably within mining, engineering, or construction projects. Strong Excel and reporting skills are essential, along with a high level of attention to detail and analytical capability. Experience with tools such as Primavera P6 and understanding of project lifecycle stages will be beneficial.

title: HR Officer – Remote
description:
We are seeking a reliable HR Officer to support recruitment and HR administration across our global teams in Australia and Southeast Asia. The role will focus on coordinating hiring activities, onboarding and offboarding, maintaining employee records, and supporting contracts and compliance. You will also assist with timesheet tracking, leave management, and general HR coordination.



The ideal candidate has 3–6 years of HR experience, strong English communication skills, and the ability to work independently in a remote environment. You should be highly organised, detail-oriented, and comfortable working with international teams. Experience in engineering or construction environments and exposure to payroll or contractor coordination will be an advantage.

title: Video Editor / Animator (Part-Time ? Full-Time Opportunity)
description:
Video Editor / Animator (Part-Time ? Full-Time Opportunity)



Type: Part-Time (20 hours per week)

Schedule: Day Shift

Salary: $7 USD per hour (1,212 USD per month) – paid every Friday

Potential: Opportunity to transition to Full-Time



About Us



We are an Australian AI technology company building innovative tools for legal professionals. Our platform helps lawyers work more efficiently using artificial intelligence.



As we continue to grow, we are expanding our video content production to support educational content, product demonstrations, and marketing campaigns. We’re looking for a creative and reliable Video Editor / Animator who can help bring our ideas to life.



Role Overview



As our Video Editor / Animator, you will transform raw footage and concepts into engaging, professional, and visually compelling videos.



You will work closely with our team to produce content for education, marketing, and product storytelling, helping communicate complex ideas in a clear and engaging way.



We have a structured workflow and feedback system in place. Editors will be expected to document feedback and improvements using a checklist system we provide, helping ensure continuous improvement and consistent production quality across projects.



Key Responsibilities



• Edit and enhance raw video footage into polished final videos



• Create engaging narratives through pacing, transitions, and storytelling



• Add graphics, animations, captions, and visual effects where appropriate



• Improve audio quality through noise reduction, music integration, and voiceovers



• Follow editing guidelines and production checklists provided by the team



• Record feedback and improvement notes into the project checklist system



• Organize video files and assets to maintain a clean production workflow



• Collaborate with the team to deliver content aligned with project goals



• Make revisions and improvements based on feedback



Required Skills



• Proven experience as a Video Editor



• Strong portfolio demonstrating editing and storytelling ability



Proficiency in tools such as:



• Adobe Premiere Pro



• After Effects



• Final Cut Pro



• or similar editing software



Strong understanding of:



• Video formats and resolutions



• Export settings and compression



• Audio editing and sound balancing



• Ability to meet deadlines and manage multiple tasks



• Strong attention to detail



Bonus Skills (Nice to Have)



• Motion graphics / animation experience



• Experience creating educational or SaaS product videos



• Familiarity with AI tools for video production



• Basic graphic design skills



What We’re Looking For



We value editors who are:



• Organized and reliable



• Creative but detail-oriented



• Open to structured workflows and feedback



• Interested in long-term collaboration



This position starts part-time, but strong performers may transition to a full-time role as our content production expands.



Application Requirements



To help us evaluate candidates properly, please include the following in your application:



• Your resume



• A short cover letter explaining your video editing experience



• A link to your portfolio showcasing your past work



• Your LinkedIn profile



• Two professional references we may contact



Please ensure your portfolio links can be viewed in an incognito window (without login access)



Additionally, please include the following details:



• Your internet speed (download and upload)



• Your computer specifications (CPU, RAM, GPU)



• Your backup internet options



• Your backup power solution in case of brownouts or outages



How to Apply



To confirm you’ve read this entire job post, please include the word:



"kangaroo"



at the end of your application.



Join our team and help create high-impact video content for the future of AI in the legal industry.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
READ THIS FIRST



[SHORT INTRO OF OUR COMPANY]



We are a Singapore based company.



Our main core business involves coaching and training a new generation of financial advisors to reach out to more people, transform more lives and build the business of their dreams.



We have coached more than 3000 Financial Advisors and have more than 8 years under our belt in doing so.



Our clients are mainly in Singapore, Malaysia and Hong Kong and we are on track to reaching out to more of them as we speak.



Right now, We are looking for an Executive Assistant to be part of our company, and to be working directly with the Chief Executive Officer (CEO).



As the Executive Assistant of our company, you will be responsible for coordinating, planning events, communicating to the team and clients, and organising all the backend logistics and operations of the company.



More importantly, your main objective is to buy back time for the CEO.



Your position will play an important and crucial role in the team’s success.





[HOW LIFE IS GONNA LOOK LIKE FOR YOU]



You will be involved in the day to day communications and supporting the CEO directly, assisting in random tasks or any tasks that the CEO requires.





There is no limit to duties an executive assistant can handle, which is why if you are taking on this role, you must have a confident, problem-solving-can-do attitude.



We will not sugarcoat anything but here’s how it is like as well.



You WILL be in a high pressure environment that will force you to step up and grow as an individual.



There will be no bullshit beautiful lies, but rather ugly truth - although necessary - but ugly all the same that will poise you for growth.



While it might be intense, the rewards are great.



Bonuses, employee benefits and perks that will ensure you get well remunerated for your efforts.



The “work hard, play hard and work even harder mantra” is here.



Because we are going to be poised for crazy growth and expansion, you will have to put on your thinking cap, initiative and out of your comfort zone to get things done.

title: Multi-Channel eCommerce Specialist (Amazon, Walmart, eBay, Shopify) – Audit, Fix, and Systemize
description:
We are looking for an experienced eCommerce specialist to help us audit, fix, and improve performance across multiple sales channels, then document processes so our internal team can maintain and scale.



This is not a long-term agency role.

This is a project-based role focused on identifying issues, implementing fixes, and creating systems.



Our business (Capital City Commerce) sells custom and novelty products across:



Amazon

Walmart

eBay

Etsy

Shopify

TikTok Shop



We already have products live and generating sales, but several channels are underperforming or suppressed, and we need an expert to diagnose and fix the root causes.



Scope of Work:

--Phase 1: Audit (High Priority)

     --Review all sales channels and identify key issues impacting performance

     --Prioritize opportunities based on revenue impact and ease of implementation

--Phase 2: Fix & Optimize

     --Walmart

          --Resolve listing quality issues (content, attributes, pricing, shipping)

          --Fix unpublished/suppressed listings

          --Improve listing completeness and compliance

     --Amazon

          --Identify and resolve listing issues (search suppression, inactive listings, etc.)

          --Optimize listings where needed (titles, bullets, backend attributes)

     --eBay

          --Diagnose why store performance is low or suppressed

          --Fix listing structure, item specifics, and visibility issues

     --Shopify

          --Review site and identify opportunities to improve conversion and sales

          --Recommend improvements (UX, product pages, offers, etc.)

     --TikTok Shop

          --Review current setup and provide growth recommendations

--Phase 3: Documentation & Handoff

     --Document key processes and fixes so our internal VA team can maintain and scale

     --Provide clear instructions and SOPs where needed



What We’re Looking For:

--Proven experience managing and optimizing multiple eCommerce platforms

--Strong understanding of:

     --Listing optimization

     --Marketplace policies

     --Catalog structure

     --Conversion fundamentals

--Ability to diagnose problems quickly and prioritize high-impact fixes

--Experience working with existing product catalogs (not just launching new brands)

--Strong communication and ability to explain decisions clearly



What We’re NOT Looking For:

--Agencies with large retainers

--Social media marketers

--“SEO-only” freelancers

--Beginners or general VA-type profiles



Project Details:

--Type: Project-based (with potential for follow-up work)

--Budget: Please include your proposed project-based pricing and timeline based on the scope above.

--Timeline: Ideally completed in 2–4 weeks



To Apply:



Please include:



1. A brief summary of your experience across Amazon, Walmart, eBay, and Shopify

2. 1–2 examples where you:

     a. Diagnosed a struggling store or listings

     b. Fixed the issues and improved performance

3. Your approach to auditing a multi-channel eCommerce business

4. The word “optimize” in the first sentence of your response so we know you read this

title: Image Annotator — Sports AI (Padel) | Remote | Full-Time (40 hrs/week) | Long-Term
description:
# About the Role



We're a sports AI company building computer vision technology for padel (a racquet sport similar to tennis). We need a detail-oriented annotator to review and correct AI-generated annotations on match footage. Our tools do most of the heavy lifting — your job is to make sure the output is accurate.



This is a long-term, full-time position with room to grow into a QA or team lead role as we scale.





# What You'll Do



- Review and correct AI-generated bounding boxes around players on a padel court (typically 4 players per frame)

- Track ball position frame-by-frame using our custom click-to-advance tool

- Flag any frames where the AI output is clearly wrong or the ball is not visible

- Maintain high accuracy and consistency across long annotation sessions

- Communicate progress and questions to the team via Slack or 

- Meet daily output targets while keeping quality high

- Fully remote, flexible hours. We care about output, not when you're online

- A small, transparent team where your work has direct impact on the product



# Requirements



Must Have:

- Strong attention to detail, this is the most important quality

- A desktop or laptop computer with a proper mouse (not trackpad)

- Stable internet connection

- Available to work 40 hours per week

- Proficient in English for written communication

- Self-motivated and comfortable working independently from home

- Comfortable with repetitive, focused screen work



Nice to Have:



- Previous experience with image annotation, data labeling, or similar tasks

- Familiarity with annotation tools (CVAT, Labelbox, Label Studio, or similar)

- Interest in or knowledge of racquet sports (padel, tennis, squash)

- Experience with video or frame-by-frame review tasks

- Previous remote work experience



What We Offer



- Fully remote, work from home

- Consistent schedule with reasonable flexibility

- Long-term, stable position, not a one-off project

- Full training provided on our annotation tools, no prior annotation experience required

- Opportunity to grow into QA reviewer or team lead as the team expands

- Work on cutting-edge sports AI technology



# How to Apply



Please send a message including:



- A short introduction about yourself

- What computer and mouse setup you use at home

- Your internet speed (you can check at speedtest.net)

- Any relevant experience (annotation, data entry, QA, or similar detail-focused work)

- Whether you have any familiarity with padel, tennis, or racquet sports

- Your earliest available start date



We will provide a short paid test task as part of the hiring process.

Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis.

title: Systems & Automation Specialist
description:
SYSTEMS & AUTOMATION SPECIALIST

Full-Time | Remote | Hours: 9:00am - 5:00pm CST (Non-Negotiable)





ABOUT US



We're a fast-growing digital marketing agency managing 150+ active clients across SEO, paid ads, and website services. Our team is lean, remote-first, and moves fast. We don't have room for people who need hand-holding — but we absolutely take care of the people who show up and deliver.





THE ROLE



We're looking for a Marketing Operations & Automation Specialist who lives in the intersection of systems, websites, and data. You'll be the person who keeps our tech stack humming — building workflows, launching sites correctly, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks operationally.



This is not a creative role. This is an execution role for someone who genuinely enjoys making things work and has a strong attention to detail.





WHAT YOU'LL OWN



- Building, managing, and optimizing automation workflows in GoHighLevel (GHL) and Zapier

- Supporting website builds and updates in WordPress using Elementor

- Setting up and verifying Google Tag Manager containers and triggers for new site launches

- Configuring Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and ensuring proper tracking is in place before sites go live

- Coordinating pre-launch checklists to ensure every client site is technically sound

- Identifying broken workflows or tracking gaps and fixing them proactively





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Proven, hands-on experience with GoHighLevel — workflows, pipelines, automations, and review tools

- Strong Zapier skills — you know how to connect platforms cleanly and troubleshoot when Zaps break

- Comfortable working in WordPress and Elementor — not a developer, but not afraid of the backend either

- Working knowledge of Google Tag Manager and GA4 setup and configuration

- Detail-oriented — you check your work before handing it off

- Reliable, communicative, and self-directed during your shift

- Excellent written English





REQUIREMENTS



- Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience in a marketing ops or automation role

- Must be available and actively working 9:00am - 5:00pm CST, Monday through Friday — this is a firm requirement, not flexible

- Stable internet connection and a professional remote setup

- Please include the word "Workflow" at the start of your application so we know you read this carefully





COMPENSATION



Competitive and based on experience. Long-term position with room to grow as the agency scales.





**If you've used GHL to build an automation you're proud of, tell us about it in your application. That's the kind of detail that gets you an interview.

title: PRODUCTION COORDINATOR SORORITY APPAREL
description:
PRODUCTION COORDINATOR

We're hiring an experienced Production Coordinator to manage the behind-the-scenes operations that keep our orders moving. This is a hands-on role that sits at the center of our supplier relationships, order flow, and production quality.

We specialize in custom apparel for college sororities and fraternities across the United States. Greek life organizations operate on tight, event-driven timelines — think Bid Day, recruitment week, formal season, and chapter events — where hundreds to thousands of garments need to be produced, approved, and delivered within strict windows. There is very little room for error, and the pace is unlike most apparel businesses.

This role is only open to candidates currently working or with direct past experience in the Greek apparel industry. If you have not worked with sorority or fraternity clients in a production, operations, or sourcing capacity, please do not apply.

Your day-to-day will include:



Communicating directly with suppliers and overseas factories

Placing, organizing, and tracking orders end-to-end

Sourcing materials and products based on client needs

Reviewing design files before production to ensure accuracy and quality

Organizing and packaging information for suppliers to minimize errors and delays

Coordinating approvals, revisions, timelines, and deadlines

Managing MOQs, lead times, and production limitations across multiple orders simultaneously



This role requires strong organizational skills, sharp attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple supplier relationships without things slipping through the cracks.

Compensation is based on experience.

title: Short Form Video Editor (Reels/Shorts/TikTok) – Finance Brand – Long Term
description:
We are a fast growing finance/markets education brand (Bull Market Blueprint – BMB) creating daily content for Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and TikTok. We’re looking for 1–2 reliable short form video editors from the Philippines for a long-term role focused on simple but well executed reel cutdowns from long form content.



This is NOT a one off gig. We want someone who can grow with us and edit content every week.



Responsibilities

- Take long form videos (talking-head finance/business content, screen recordings, webinars) and turn them into 20–60 second clips.

- Add clean, readable captions optimized for mobile (we provide references + templates).

- Add basic pattern interrupts: jump cuts, punch-ins, zooms, simple sound emphasis, light B-roll when needed.

- Export in vertical 9:16 format (Reels/Shorts/TikTok ready).

- Work in batches (for example, 10–20 clips from one long video).

- Deliver on time consistently and be responsive on chat during agreed hours.



What this job is NOT

- Not heavy After Effects or complex motion graphics.

- Not cinematic edits or full YouTube documentaries.

- Not random projects; this is ongoing, systemized work.



Requirements

- Proven experience editing short-form vertical content (Reels/Shorts/TikTok). Please have links ready.

- Strong sense of pacing for educational / talking?head videos.

- Good English comprehension; you must catch obvious grammar/spelling mistakes in captions.

- Comfortable following a preset/template so you can edit quickly and consistently.

- Stable internet connection and a decent computer for video editing.

- Software: Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro (CapCut can be a plus but not as the only tool).

- Experience editing finance, business, or coaching/creator content.

- Familiarity with YouTube/IG/TikTok best practices for hooks, text size, etc.



Work Schedule & Volume

- We are flexible on exact hours as long as deadlines are hit.

- Expect 30–60 shorts per month to start (20–60 sec each), with potential to increase if we’re a good fit.

- Long?term role: we are looking for someone who wants stable, ongoing work.



Salary / Compensation

- Please propose your expected MONTHLY salary in PHP for:

- Part-time: ~20–30 hours/week, 30–60 shorts per month.

- We are open to performance-based increases after the first 1–3 months based on reliability, speed, and quality.



How to Apply

1. Make sure your Onlinejobs.ph profile is complete with your work history and skills.

2. Fill out this short application form (required): 


 

3. In your message here on Onlinejobs.ph, include:

- Subject line: “Short-Form Editor – BMB”

- 2–3 sentences about your experience with Reels/Shorts/TikTok

- Your expected monthly salary (PHP) for part-time



Only applicants who complete the Typeform and share portfolio links will be considered.



We will shortlist candidates and invite them to a small PAID test (1–2 short videos) so both sides can see if it’s a fit before we start a trial month.

title: Content Manager
description:
Tri-Wellness is a holistic wellness brand founded by Lisa Shanken — an executive functioning coach, certified health counselor, personal trainer, and yoga instructor. Our mission is to help people live healthier, more harmonious lives through a whole-person approach that connects the gut, brain, body, and daily habits. We work especially closely with neurodivergent adults and those navigating mental health challenges, meeting every client with warmth, practicality, and zero judgment.



Our core services include:



Executive Functioning Coaching: One-on-one coaching focused on skills like time management, emotional regulation, organization, and impulse control)



Social Bloom: A structured group program that helps adults build meaningful friendships and social skills in a supportive, confidential setting



Love Bloom: Neurodivergent-friendly speed dating and connection events reimagined to feel safe, low-pressure, and genuinely fun.



Content plays a direct role in filling all of these programs — and you will play a central role in ensuring their success.



Your Role



We are seeking a part-time (20 hours per week, with potential to move to full-time) mid-level Content Manager who can translate Lisa's voice, philosophy, and expertise into compelling stories across every touchpoint. You'll be the keeper of the brand to ensure that everything we publish, whether a blog post, an Instagram caption, a website page, or a weekly newsletter, feels cohesive, human, and true to who Lisa is.



Your content will serve multiple strategic goals: attracting and converting the right people into coaching clients, Social Bloom group members, and Love Bloom event attendees; building Lisa's credibility and visibility within the professional and B2B community to generate referral partnerships with therapists, psychologists, psychiatrists, and other allied health professionals and communities; and supporting the recruitment of coaches to empower us to expand the Tri-Wellness model to other parts of the country.



Work Environment & Job Details



- You have your own computer and Internet connection (this is a home-based position)

- You must be willing to work at least 2 hours per day between 8am-6pm MST

- Part-Time Role: 20 hours per week, with potential to move to full-time

- We provide guaranteed 100% on-time salary payments



What You'll Do



Editorial & Storytelling



- Own and manage the editorial calendar across all content channels

- Write and edit blog posts and articles on topics spanning executive functioning, social skills, nutrition, fitness, gut health, mindfulness, and neurodiversity

- Collaborate closely with Lisa to capture her authentic voice and translate her expertise into accessible, engaging content

- Develop content series, campaigns, and storytelling frameworks that deepen audience connection and build trust with both the neurodivergent community and professional referral partners

- Provide brand/content aligned video scripts for Lisa to create videos that support the overall content marketing strategy; light video editing as necessary



Social Media & Brand Voice



- Manage and grow Tri-Wellness social media presence (Instagram,
, TikTok, LinkedIn, and others as relevant)

- Write platform-native content that reflects Lisa's warm, practical, and empowering tone

- Develop content that speaks to multiple audiences: individuals seeking executive functioning support, adults looking to build social connections through Social Bloom, neurodivergent adults open to dating and connection through Love Bloom, and professionals in the mental health and wellness space who may either refer clients and/or join the Tri-Wellness coaching team as it expands throughout the U.S.

- Use LinkedIn strategically to build Lisa's thought leadership presence among therapists, psychologists, social workers, special education professionals, and other allied health providers

- Create and execute social campaigns around group enrollment windows and event registration deadlines to drive sign-ups

- Repurpose long-form content into short-form social assets



Website Content



- Audit, refresh, and maintain website copy to ensure it accurately reflects the brand and converts visitors into clients, group members, and referral partners

- Write and update service pages, landing pages, and evergreen content in Lisa's voice

- Develop content that speaks to prospective coaches interested in joining or expanding the Tri-Wellness model in their region

- Partner with web developer to ensure content and presentation are aligned



 Marketing



- Create
 newsletter content

- Develop nurture sequences and campaign
s for Tri-Welness offerings, i.e. Executive Functioning Coaching, Social Bloom group enrollment, and Love Bloom events

- Develop nurture sequences and campaign
s targeted to various audience segments, e.g. gender (male/female); mental health challenges (ADHD, neurodivergence, anxiety), etc…

- Build and maintain a separate communication stream for professional and B2B audiences, including referral partners and prospective coaches

- Drive list growth through thoughtful opt-in strategies and consistent value delivery



Funnel Building & Conversion



- Own the content strategy across the full marketing funnel — from awareness to action — ensuring every piece of content has a clear role in moving the right person closer to working with Tri-Wellness

- Develop top-of-funnel content (blog, social, lead magnets) designed to drive traffic and grow the opt-in list with qualified, mission-aligned audiences

- Build and optimize mid-funnel nurture content that educates, builds trust, and speaks directly to the pain points and goals of each audience segment

- Drive bottom-of-funnel conversions specific to each service: booked discovery calls for Executive Functioning Coaching and Social Bloom group enrollment, and direct ticket sales for Love Bloom events

- Collaborate with Lisa to develop lead magnets, free resources, or gated content that attract the right people into the funnel





What We're Looking For



- 3–5 years of content creation, content marketing and editorial experience, ideally in wellness, mental health, and coaching

- Proficient in leveraging AI tools to work more efficiently — while consistently preserving Lisa's human voice and never letting AI flatten the warmth or specificity that defines the brand

- A strong writer with a warm, conversational style who can adapt across formats and audiences — from long-form editorial to professional thought leadership to conversion-driven

- Experience ghostwriting or writing in someone else's voice by translating brand voice into compelling content

- Demonstrated ability to create content that drives action (sign-ups, registrations, inquiries, referrals), not just engagement

- Genuine comfort with topics like mental health, neurodiversity, executive functioning, and holistic wellness

- Self-directed, organized, and able to manage multiple content streams and audiences independently



Nice To Have



- Personal or professional connection to the neurodivergent community

- Experience marketing to or communicating with healthcare or mental health professionals

- Basic graphic design skills for social assets (e.g., Canva)

- Light video editing for social media video content

- Background in health coaching, integrative nutrition, or a related field

- Experience growing a personal brand or thought leadership platform



Why This Role



This is a chance to do meaningful work that genuinely helps people. You'll have real creative ownership across every content channel, a close working relationship with Lisa, and the opportunity to shape a brand that has both heart and depth — one that's growing its reach, not just with individual clients, but within the broader professional wellness community nationwide.



If this describes you - and you possess the skills sets we are seeking - then we'd love to have you on board with us! You can apply thru this link: 
==

title: Full Time Remote Customer Support Assistant
description:
We are building a distributed support team and are looking for a Customer Support Assistant who takes written communication seriously and values consistency in their work. This is a full-time remote position designed for someone who wants dependable income, clear expectations, and the chance to grow within a structured environment over time.



This role is not project-based or temporary. We are looking for someone who wants stability, is comfortable working set hours, and understands that strong support is built on reliability and attention to detail.



You will spend your workday handling customer conversations through written messages. Your responsibility is to provide clear, accurate, and professional responses while maintaining a friendly tone. You will work within defined guidelines, manage several conversations at the same time, and ensure users receive timely and helpful replies. Part of the role also involves flagging recurring issues, technical problems, or useful feedback so the team can improve processes and systems.

Full onboarding and training are provided before you begin working independently.



This role requires strong written English and a typing speed of at least 60 words per minute. You must have a reliable internet connection of 50-100 Mbps or higher. A dependable laptop or desktop computer with at least 8 GB of RAM is required.



You should be available full-time for a consistent schedule of eight hours per day, six days per week. We value people who are detail-oriented, professional in their communication, dependable in meeting expectations, and open to feedback and improvement.



Previous experience in customer support, chat-based roles, or remote work is helpful but not required.



The hourly pay for this position ranges from 4 to 6 USD, depending on experience and performance.

In addition to base pay, there are performance-based bonuses, regular reviews, and opportunities for raises. Team members who consistently perform well can grow into higher-responsibility and higher-paying roles over time.



Why Join Us?

You’ll be working remotely in a structured environment with clear systems, training, and expectations. This role is ideal for someone who wants long-term stability rather than short-term gigs, and who values growth through consistent performance.



Apply now by sending us a message with all relevant information mentioned above and we look forward to having you!

) tools

title: Creator Outreach - Setter
description:
Job post summary

Date posted: April 10, 2026

Pay: ?47,728.00 - ?71,592.00 per month

Work Location: Remote



Submit your Application here: 
/
/f/2kz0ma3h-1156/MHHLY4BOXCKVXG8CCW





Job description:



About the Role

This is a mid-level hybrid role sitting at the intersection of creator acquisition and operational excellence. You will be the engine that keeps a steady flow of qualified creators moving into our sales pipeline, and the safeguard that ensures nothing falls through the cracks once a deal is closed.



You will not be running sales calls — our partner handles those. What you will own is everything that happens before and after: sourcing and engaging creators across platforms, filling the partner's calendar with qualified prospects, and then taking full ownership of the contract, onboarding, and setup process from signature through to kickoff.



This role is well suited to someone who has spent two or more years in outreach, partnerships, operations, or a similar function and is ready to take on broader ownership across a full creator lifecycle. You bring structure, initiative, and a closer's mentality to everything you do.



What You Will Be Doing Lead Generation & Outreach



- Proactively source and qualify creators across
, Instagram, and other relevant platforms

- Identify and obtain personal contact information using a combination of manual research techniques and specialist tooling

- Execute outreach via direct messaging and
, with a strong focus on conversion

- Develop and bring your own lead generation ideas and angles alongside established playbooks — we want your thinking, not just your execution

- Build and maintain clean, accurate lead and pipeline records in Airtable with rigorous data hygiene

- Book qualified prospects directly into the partner's calendar for closing calls



Contract Management & Creator Onboarding

- Upon deal closure, assume full ownership of the post-sale process

- Issue contracts reflecting each creator's specific commercial terms — precision here is non-negotiable, as we are legally bound by what is documented

- Manage signature collection and all back-and-forth on amendment requests, including drafting redlines with AI assistance and routing documents through DocuSign

- Set up each signed creator in Google Chat and Notion in accordance with our standard operating procedures

- Schedule kickoff calls with our Head of Client Success to ensure a seamless handover



What We Are Looking ForExperience & Track Record

- 2+ years of experience in a role involving outreach, business development, partnerships, operations, or a closely related function

- Some exposure to cold outreach with measurable results — you do not need an extensive track record, but you should be able to speak to what worked and why

- Experience maintaining records in Airtable, a CRM, or a comparable project management tool

- Prior exposure to contracts or commercial documentation is advantageous but not required



Skills & Attributes

- Closer mentality. You own outcomes, not tasks. If a signed contract is the goal and a creator goes quiet, you follow up — at 48 hours, and again, and again — until it is done. You do not mark something complete until it actually is.

- Highly organised. You maintain clean systems, think in processes, and understand that good records are a business-critical function, not an administrative afterthought.

- Detail-oriented. Particularly around contracts, commercial terms, and data integrity. Errors in these areas have real consequences, and you treat them accordingly.

- Self-starter. You generate your own ideas for lead generation and process improvement rather than waiting to be directed. You see gaps and fill them.

- Clear, professional written English. You write concisely and persuasively — whether drafting a cold outreach message or following up on a contract signature.

- Confident AI user. You actively use tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini for problem-solving, drafting, and contract work. This is not optional — it is part of how we operate.



Practical Requirements

- Reliable equipment and a stable, high-speed internet connection — this is a hard requirement

- Availability across a broad working window; our creators and partners operate across multiple time zones, and flexibility is more important than fixed hours



Why This Role

This is a role with genuine ownership from day one. You will not be executing a narrow set of tasks — you will be responsible for two critical functions of the business and will have the latitude to improve the systems and processes you work within. For the right candidate, it is an opportunity to grow quickly, take on commercially significant responsibilities, and make a visible impact on creator growth.

mber meets standards and stays accountable

title: Online Academic Tutor (English, Math and/or Science)
description:
We are seeking a passionate and dedicated Online Academic Tutor to deliver high-quality virtual instruction to students from Kindergarten through to Year 12 across Australia. The ideal candidate will foster a love for learning, adapt to individual student needs, and deliver engaging lessons aligned with the Australian Curriculum.



This role offers flexibility, allowing tutors to specialize in one, two, or all three subject areas: English, Mathematics, and Science, depending on their expertise and experience.



Responsibilities:

1. Deliver engaging, age-appropriate online lessons in English, Mathematics, and/or Science to students from Kindergarten to Year 12.

2. Develop and implement tailored lesson plans based on the Australian Curriculum and individual student learning needs.

3. Reinforce key concepts based on subject expertise:

- English: literacy, grammar, reading comprehension, and writing skills

- Mathematics: numeracy, algebra, geometry, statistics, and problem-solving

- Science: biology, chemistry, physics, and general scientific inquiry

4. Use interactive teaching methods, digital tools, and learning resources to enhance student engagement.

5. Assess student performance and provide regular, constructive feedback.

6. Monitor and track student progress, attendance, and academic outcomes.

7. Maintain accurate records of lessons and student development.

8. Communicate regularly with parents or guardians regarding student progress.

9. Encourage critical thinking, creativity, and confidence in learning.

10. Participate in tea
etings, training sessions, and ongoing professional development.



Qualifications:

1. Bachelor’s degree in Education or a relevant field (English, Mathematics, Science, or related discipline); teaching qualification preferred.

2. Experience teaching or tutoring students at Kindergarten, Primary, or Secondary levels (online experience highly regarded).

3. Strong understanding of the Australian Curriculum in at least one subject area (English, Math, or Science); proficiency in multiple subjects is an advantage.

4. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

5. Proficiency in using online teaching platforms (e.g., Zoom, Google Classroom, Microsoft Teams, or similar tools).

6. Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional home workspace.

7. Patient, adaptable, and student-focused with a passion for helping learners succeed.

title: eCommerce Catalog & Operations Virtual Assistant (Remote)
description:
We are seeking a highly detail-oriented Virtual Assistant (VA) to join our team and help Capital City Commerce scale its eCommerce operations.



This role is focused on executing and managing structured, repeatable tasks that keep our product catalog organized, optimized, and running efficiently across multiple marketplaces including Amazon, Walmart, eBay, TikTok Shop, and Shopify.



You will play a critical role in helping us scale by creating product bundles, managing listings across channels, and supporting inventory and fulfillment workflows.



We provide clear SOPs, Loom videos, and structured processes for all tasks. Success in this role comes down to attention to detail, consistency, and ability to follow systems accurately.



We expect this role to require approximately 20–30 hours per week with the potential for growth over time.



Responsibilities:

--Amazon Virtual Bundles

     --Create and manage product bundles using existing products

     --Continuously expand bundle combinations based on guidelines

--Cross-Channel Listing Management

     --Take existing product listings and replicate them across additional marketplaces (Amazon, Walmart, eBay, Shopify, TikTok)

     --Ensure consistency in titles, descriptions, images, and attributes

--Catalog Maintenance

     --Identify and fix listing issues such as missing information, incorrect data, or duplicates

     --Maintain a clean and organized product catalog

--Inventory & Fulfillment Support

     --Track inventory levels across marketplaces based on predefined thresholds and report weekly

     --Flag products that need replenishment based on defined thresholds

     --Set up FBA, FBT, and WFS shipments in each platform

     --Generate and organize shipping labels for fulfillment

--Process Execution

     --Follow documented SOPs and workflows precisely

     --Suggest improvements to processes when opportunities are identified



Requirements:

--Strong attention to detail (critical for success in this role)

--Ability to follow step-by-step processes consistently

--Organized and process-driven mindset

--Strong written English communication skills

--Ability to work independently and manage time effectively

--Comfortable using Google Sheets / Docs

--Experience with e-commerce seller portals such as Amazon Seller Central, Etsy Shop Manager, and others (preferred)

--Comfortable with Canva or basic image editing tools (preferred)



Nice to Have:

--Experience with e-commerce seller portals such as Amazon Seller Central, Etsy Shop Manager, and others

--Familiarity with Canva or basic image editing tools

--Experience working with product listings or catalog management





Application Process



We use a multi-step process to identify candidates who are detail-oriented and a strong fit for our team:



1. Review our company and product listings:













2. Submit a Loom video (max 3 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining:

     --Why you are a good fit for this role

     --Your experience with detailed or repetitive tasks

     --How you stay organized and accurate in your work



3. Selected candidates will complete a short paid task related to product bundling



Please include the word “bundle” in the first sentence of your application so we know you read this.

title: Content Growth Operator (Marketing Manager – Revenue & Systems Focused)
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE :

We are not looking for a typical social media manager. We are looking for a high-level Content Growth Operator — someone who can turn content, data, and brand into measurable business growth. Your job is not to post content. 



Your job is to build and operate a system that drives: 

? leads 

? sales 

? retention 

? long-term revenue 



This role requires strong thinking, decision-making, and ownership. 



WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR 

This role is for someone who: 

? thinks like a strategist, not just an executor 

? understands how content connects to revenue 

? can analyze data and make decisions independently 

? can lead direction without constant supervision 



WHO THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR 

Do not apply if: 

? you only know how to post or edit content 

? you rely heavily on trends without strategy 

? you need step-by-step instructions for everything 

? you cannot explain how content drives sales 



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES 

1. Content Strategy & Growth 

? Build and execute a content strategy aligned with revenue goals 

? Identify high-performing content pillars 

? Map content across the full customer journey 



2. Revenue-Focused Marketing 

? Track leads, conversions, and revenue from content 

? Focus on attracting qualified buyers, not just views 

? Align content with offers and sales funnels 



3. Performance Tracking & Optimization 

? Build and manage a weekly performance dashboard 

? Identify what is working, what is not, and why 

? Make data-driven decisions and adjustments 



4. Content Direction (Not Just Execution) 

? Lead ideation and content planning 

? Provide clear direction to editors or creators 

? Extract ideas from the CEO and turn them into scalable content 



5. Systems & Workflow 

? Build SOPs and repeatable systems for content production 

? Create efficient workflows for ideation, posting, and repurposing 



6. Testing & Scaling 

? Run tests on hooks, formats, topics, and CTAs 

? Scale what works and eliminate what does not 



7. Multi-Platform Strategy 

? Understand how different platforms work (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube,
) 

? Adapt content per platform instead of reposting blindly 



REQUIRED SKILLS 

? Strong understanding of content strategy and marketing 

? Ability to connect content to business outcomes and revenue 

? Experience with analytics and performance tracking 

? Strong decision-making and problem-solving skills 

? Ability to think in systems and build processes 

? Strong communication and leadership ability 



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE 

? Increased qualified leads from content 

? Improved conversion from content to sales 

? Clear weekly insights and action plans 

? A structured content system that runs efficiently 



COMPENSATION 

? Based on experience 

? Performance-based incentives available for strong candidates 



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (IMPORTANT) 



To apply, follow these steps exactly: 

1. Send your resume and portfolio.  

2. Send a Loom video (2–5 minutes) answering: 

? How do you turn content into revenue for a service-based business? 

? What metrics matter most to you and why? 

3. Include links to: 

? Brands or accounts you have worked on 

? Specific results you helped achieve 

4. Answer this question in your application: 

? If nothing in our content is performing after 60 days, what would you do? 



Applications without these will not be reviewed. 

You can send your application to: 



FINAL NOTE 

We are not hiring someone to “manage content.” 

We are hiring someone who can build a system that drives real business growth. 

If you are someone who thinks strategically, takes ownership, and focuses on results — we 

would love to hear from you.

title: Sales & Tech Representative
description:
We’re Hiring!!!



Are you a skilled salesperson with a background in gas plumbing and/or electrical work? Do you enjoy helping customers find the right solution while using your technical knowledge? Join our growing team and work with a US online home goods retailer that values expertise, professionalism, and customer satisfaction.





Position:

Sales & Tech Representative – Technical Products (Gas & Electrical Focus)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Schedule: Monday-Friday, 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM EST (40 hours/week)

Salary: Competitive + Performance Bonuses





About the Role:

As a Salesperson, you will assist customers with product selection, provide technical support during the sales process, and close sales with confidence. You’ll work with gas fireplaces, heaters, stoves, and other appliances, so previous hands-on experience or technical knowledge of gas or electrical systems is a MUST.





Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Help customers choose the right gas or electric heating appliance for their needs

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

Explain technical specifications and installation requirements in simple terms

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them





Requirements:

Sales Experience – 2+ years, preferably with B2C or B2B technical products

Gas Plumbing or Electrical Experience – Formal training or work experience (installer, technician, or similar roles preferred)

Excellent English – Both written and spoken

Confident Communicator – Can explain complex concepts to non-technical customers

Tech-Savvy – Comfortable using CRMs,
 platforms, order tools, etc.

Reliable and Proactive – Takes initiative and works independently

Home Office Setup – Stable internet, noise-free environment, backup power is a plus





Preferred but Not Required:

Knowledge of venting, HVAC, or hearth appliances

US product or code familiarity

Experience in the construction or home improvement industry





Why Join Us?

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping cost. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position





How to Apply:

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph with the subject line: "Sales Pro - [Your Name]"

title: Interior Designer (Full-Time, Remote) – Build Magical Spaces for a Global Hospitality Brand
description:
We’re looking for a full-time Interior Designer to join a fast-growing hospitality brand that builds immersive, story-driven spaces, often described as the Disney of short stays.



This is not a freelance or side-hustle role.



This is a full-time, exclusive position for a designer who wants to fully commit to one brand, own projects end-to-end, and build a long-term creative career.



If you’re looking to juggle multiple clients or keep other professional commitments, this role will not be the right fit.





About the Role:



You will be the sole Interior Designer responsible for running design projects from start to finish.



That means you will:



- Lead each project from concept to final delivery

- Drive timelines, milestones, and 
ntum

- Run kick-offs, reviews, and design sessions

- Own modelling, layouts, FF&E, and specifications

- Proactively push projects forward without being chased

- Collaborate with a creative director for vision and alignment



You won’t be given tasks.

You’ll be given ownership.





Exclusivity & Focus (Important):



This role requires full professional focus.





We’re looking for someone who:



- Treats this as their only professional design role

- Does not take on other client work or employment

- Wants to invest their creative energy into building one brand deeply

- Thinks and operates as if this were their own business



We believe the quality and pace of work we’re aiming for is only possible with complete focus and commitment.





The Kind of Designer We’re Looking For



This role is for someone who:

- Thinks like an owner, not an employee

- Is highly proactive and self-driven

- Is comfortable being the single point of responsibility

- Is responsive and reliable in fast-moving environments

- Takes pride in their work and their craft

- Wants to build a long-term career, not just complete jobs



We care far more about ownership, judgement, and 
ntum than about where you studied or how many years you’ve worked.



How We Work:



- Fully remote

- Outcome-driven

- High autonomy, high trust

- Fast-moving projects

- Real creative freedom



The only strict expectation is responsiveness when tagged or messaged, because that’s how projects keep moving.





Compensation Structure



- Monthly base pay

- Plus a performance-based bonus per project onboarded



High performers are directly rewarded for the projects they successfully deliver.



Exact figures will be discussed with shortlisted candidates.





What Success Looks Like



In your first 90 days, you’ll be:



- Running multiple projects independently

- Driving timelines without being prompted

- Producing high-quality, immersive designs

- Becoming the creative owner of our spaces





How to Apply



Please include:



- A link to your portfolio

- A short video answering these questions, uploaded to a public google drive link:



“This role requires full professional focus with no other work commitments. Why does that suit you at this stage of your career?” and "If someone was to tell you, you were going to join the Disney of the short-stay industry, how would that make you feel?"





If you’re looking for a place to truly own your craft and grow long-term, we’d love to hear from you.
