title: Floor Plan Editor
description:
Full-time | 40 hours per week | 7:30 AM–4:00 PM ACDT | Adelaide, South Australia



Clique Creative is South Australia’s go-to for top-tier photography, videography, and marketing services. Our vision is to craft and inspire high-quality, consistent marketing solutions for property, people, and projects—while delivering a premium customer experience and fostering a fun, supportive workplace.



We’re looking for a highly skilled and detail-driven Floor Plan Editor to join our vibrant team. This position is a work-from-home position, working 40 hours per week, Monday to Friday, 7:00AM to 3:00PM ACDT, in alignment with our production and scheduling needs. 



As the Floor Plan Editor, you will play a central role in keeping our production pipeline running smoothly each day. A key component of your work involves quality controlling floor plans each day for accuracy, completing edits in Adobe Illustrator, forecasting workloads, and ensuring all outputs meet client and agency standards.  This is a very important part of our business and floor plan accuracy is paramount.



Key Responsibilities - Floor Plan Quality Control:

- Conduct daily checks on floor plans for accuracy, consistency, and compliance with standards.

- Complete edits in Adobe Illustrator software.

- Forecast upcoming floor plan workloads and assess resource needs.

- Identify, record, and communicate discrepancies or design issues.

- Maintain workflow efficiency to meet strict daily deadlines.



About You

You will succeed in this role if you:



- Have excellent English, written and verbal

- Have exceptional attention to detail.

- Have 3 years minimum experience in a similar position.

- Are confident using Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator.

- Are comfortable with Google Drive, Gmail, and Mac/iOS systems.

- Are highly organised and efficient with task prioritisation.

- Thrive in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment.

- Enjoy interacting with clients and colleagues.

- Work well independently and as part of a supportive team.

- (Bonus) Have experience or interest in architecture, drafting, or design.



Why Join Clique Creative?



- Join a fun, supportive, and passionate creative team.

- Work in an environment that values quality, innovation, consistency, and teamwork.

- Enjoy a varied role with opportunities to grow your operational and creative skills.

- Be part of a well-regarded creative services company supporting property, people, and projects across South Australia.



How to Apply



If you’re ready to join a dynamic, quality-driven creative team, we’d love to hear from you.

Please submit your CV and a brief cover letter to Alex Perez at 
 outlining why you’re the right fit for this role.

title: GoHighLevel EXPERT
description:
We are a marketing agency.

We need a GoHighLevel expert to build and manage the full backend system for our clinic clients. This is a long-term full-time position with room to grow as we scale.



*What you will be building and managing:



CRM setup with custom pipelines and contact fields for each client

SMS and
 drip sequences (speed-to-lead, nurture, appointment reminders, no-show recovery, re-engagement)

Automated workflows (lead comes in from
 ad ? instant SMS fires ?
 fires ? lead enters pipeline ? notifications sent)

Calendar and booking system setup with Google Calendar sync

Missed call text-back configuration

Reputation management workflows (automated Google review requests after appointments)

Reporting dashboards for clients

Deploying GHL snapshots to new client sub-accounts and customizing for each clinic

Troubleshooting broken workflows and maintaining system health



Requirements:



Minimum 1 year using GoHighLevel daily (not just watching tutorials — actually building workflows and automations for clients)

Experience building SMS and
 sequences

Comfortable with Zapier or Make for occasional external integrations

Reliable internet and available during US business hours (EST preferred, some overlap required)

Strong written English for writing SMS and
 templates



EXTRA:

Experience with Meta Ads and CAPI Integrations - Tracking Meta Ad Performance with GHL



This is a full-time role. You will start by building our master client template (snapshot) and then deploy and manage it for each new clinic we onboard. As we grow you will be our go-to person for everything inside GoHighLevel.

title: Automotive Operations and Dispatch Coordinator
description:
Key Responsibilities



1. Fleet & Retail Ops Coordination

*Own the estimate-to-approval-to-route workflow:

*Create and submit estimates

*Follow up for approval

*Ensure parts are sourced

*Finalize tech routes for the following day

*Track all jobs in progress and flag issues proactively

*Ensure routes are realistic and efficient; confirm techs are prepped and ready

*Communicate clearly with customers and fleet managers about job timing, status, and follow-ups

*Submit and close out fleet approvals in Element, LeasePlan, and AutoIntegrate

*Ensure invoices match approvals; follow up on outstanding invoices and missing payments



2. Scheduling & Productivity Tracking

*Maintain the daily technician schedule, making updates as needed

*Monitor tech productivity; flag idle time, reschedules, or delays

*Track time logs and coordinate with bookkeeper for payroll



3. Customer Communication

*Respond to incoming texts, WhatsApp messages, and system inquiries in a timely, professional manner

*Follow up with clients as needed to resolve open issues or gather job-related info

*Escalate concerns appropriately and promptly



4. Admin & Reporting

*Submit a detailed Daily Recap covering completed work, pending tasks, blockers, and KPIs

*Keep Trello and other tools up-to-date with accurate job and task statuses

*Track inventory needs and coordinate ordering of parts, oil, and supplies

*Monitor A/R and follow up on past-due fleet invoices



5. Marketing & Content Support

*Publish our monthly newsletter in MailChimp with content from marketing team

*Coordinate publishing of content to Instagram /
 / Google My Business

*Other light admin support as needed for the marketing team



What Success Looks Like

*All work orders, estimates, approvals, and tech routes are handled with zero dropped balls

*You identify blockers or problems before they become fires

*Communication is clear, timely, and professional — with both customers and internal team

*The business runs like a machine — nothing gets missed or delayed

*You take full ownership of your responsibilities and require very little follow-up



Who You Are

*A natural systems thinker who thrives on clarity, organization, and ownership

*Extremely proactive — you don’t wait to be told what to do

*Excellent at written and verbal English communication

*Comfortable in the automotive world and eager to learn the details

*Sharp and reliable — you retain info, spot gaps, and follow through



Experience & Skills Required

*3+ years of experience in a remote automotive: coordinator, dispatcher, operations role

*Demonstrated responsibility for keeping things moving without handholding

*Excellent written and spoken English

*Experience with dispatch, route planning, or technician scheduling

*Familiar with tools like Slack, Google Docs, Trello (or similar), CRM/invoicing platforms

*Experience working with U.S.-based field service, auto, or fleet companies

*Bonus: Familiarity with AutoIntegrate, Housecall Pro, Element, or LeasePlan platforms



Required Software Experience

*Slack

*WhatsApp

*Trello (or similar)

*Google Workspace

*CRM / invoicing tools (Housecall Pro, AutoIntegrate)

* Monday . com (plus)



TECH REQUIREMENTS:

*Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed

*Dual monitor setup is required to ensure efficiency in managing multiple applications simultaneously.

*Location: Remote (Philippines)

*Schedule: Part-time or Full-time, US hours



*Part-time Schedule

**Tuesday 1-5 pm

**Wednesday 1-5 pm

**Friday 8:30 - 7:30 pm

**Saturday 10-4 pm

**Sunday 2-5 pm



*Full-time Schedule

**Monday to Friday 9:30AM -6:30PM

Pay: Php288.46 - Php432.69 hourly rate



Application Instructions:

Fill out this form: 

After submitting the form, click the apply button and send us a short message on why you would be a good fit for the role.

title: Sales Person
description:
We are looking for a Sales Person who is experienced but at the same time willing to learn and listen to new sales techniques.



The company you’ll be representing is a well-established catering company based in Maryland, known for delivering exceptional culinary experiences and outstanding service. You’ll work closely with the CEO and will be trained by her on how to win deals.



Responsibilities:

++ Identify and pursue new sales opportunities through inbound leads, referrals, and outbound outreach

++ Build and maintain strong, long-term customer relationships

++ Prepare and deliver persuasive presentations and proposals

++ Bring potential customers through the sales process and close contracts to meet or exceed sales targets

++ Track and manage sales activity using CRM tools



Qualifications:

>> Proven experience in sales with a strong record of closing deals

>> Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills

>> Positive, coachable attitude and a willingness to adopt new strategies

>> Highly organized, self-motivated, and goal-driven

>> Must be available to work Eastern Time (ET) hours



If you’re an experienced salesperson who’s open to learning new techniques and enjoys helping clients bring their events to life, we’d love to hear from you. Please include "I am your deal maker" in the subject line of your response.



Also, please answer the following questions:

1. What types of companies have you supported as a Sales Person?

2. Based on your answer in number 1, what were your responsibilities?

3. Please share an example of a time when you successfully closed a major deal.

4. For you, what is the hardest part of being a Sales Person?

5. How much is your hourly rate?

6. Can you commit in working ET hours?

title: N8N Web Developer
description:
We're looking for a skilled N8N Developer to design, build, and maintain complex automation workflows. You'll integrate APIs, manage environment migrations, and build automation solutions that scale.



Requirements:



> N8N

Hands-on experience with the N8N automation platform

Proven track record building complex, multi-step workflows



> APIs & MCP 

Proven experience working with REST APIs and third-party integrations

Familiarity with MCP (Model Context Protocol) and AI-driven integrations



> Environment Management 

Experience migrating workflows between Development and Production environments

Understanding of environment variables, version control, and deployment best practices



Nice to Have (but not required):

Experience with Supabase (database, auth, or edge functions)



Skills

a. Critical thinking and strong problem-solving ability

b. Resourceful and solution-oriented with ambiguous requirements

c. Strong async communication for remote collaboration



The Role:

* Part-time, flexible hours within the Philippines timezone (PHT)

* Fully remote



Please answer the following when you apply:

1. Describe a complex N8N workflow you've built. What was the use case, how many nodes did it involve, and what was the biggest challenge you solved?

2. Walk us through how you handle migrating an N8N workflow from a development environment to production. What steps do you take to ensure nothing breaks?

3. Tell us about a time an API integration didn't go as planned. How did you diagnose the issue and what did you do to fix it?

4. How much is your hourly rate?

title: Virtual assistant
description:

We are a growing plumbing company in South Florida looking for a highly organized and reliable Virtual Assistant to join our team. We take pride in providing excellent customer service and are looking for someone who can help us stay efficient, professional, and responsive.

The Virtual Assistant will handle daily administrative and customer service tasks, support our scheduling and follow-up processes, and assist with light marketing activities. Highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented



Friendly, professional, and resourceful



Reliable with a strong work ethic

Work Schedule & Compensation:

Competitive hourly rate or weekly salary based on experience



Opportunity for long-term, stable employment

title: Social Media Manager – Paediatric Speech Therapy Clinic
description:
We are looking for a creative and reliable Social Media Manager to grow and manage our Instagram presence for a pediatric speech therapy business.



This role is perfect for someone who understands content strategy, aesthetics, and audience engagement, and is passionate about creating meaningful and educational content.



Responsibilities

- Plan, create, and schedule consistent Instagram content (posts, reels, stories)

- Develop engaging and educational content related to:

- Pediatric speech therapy

- Language development tips

- Parent education

- Write captions that are engaging, informative, and aligned with our brand voice

- Design and maintain a consistent and aesthetically pleasing Instagram feed

- Stay up to date with Instagram trends, reels, and algorithm changes

- Identify optimal posting times and strategies for growth

- Manage hashtags, engagement, and basic community interaction (comments, DMs if required)

- Assist with promotions, ads, and boosting posts



Requirements

- Proven experience managing Instagram accounts (please provide examples)

- Strong understanding of:

- Instagram algorithm

- Content strategy & growth

- Reels and short-form video trends

- Ability to create visually appealing content (Canva or similar tools)

- Basic knowledge of social media marketing and advertising

- Creative thinker with initiative (able to suggest ideas independently)

- Strong English communication skills



Bonus (not required but highly valued):

- Experience in healthcare, education, or pediatric content

- Video editing skills (CapCut, InShot, etc.)



What We’re Looking For

- Someone creative, proactive, and organised

- Someone who can take ownership and bring fresh ideas regularly

- Someone who understands how to turn educational content into engaging content

title: Nurse Advocate
description:
We are seeking a Remote Nurse Advocate to provide high-quality patient support and ensure smooth delivery of mental health services. This role focuses on patient communication, appointment coordination, case documentation, and assistance with forms, pharmacy issues, telepsychiatry processes, and care navigation.



Responsibilities



Provide empathetic emotional support to patients throughout their treatment.



Assist patients with registration, onboarding, and understanding telepsychiatry platforms.



Help complete disability forms and support physicians with accommodation letters.



Coordinate lab work appointments and assist patients in obtaining medical records.



Guide patients through pharmacy or prescription-related issues.



Resolve support escalations through Zoom calls or virtual communication.



Advocate for patient rights, needs, and access to care.



Manage appointment scheduling, rescheduling, and notifications of any changes.



Assist with out-of-network claims and respond to billing or payment-related queries.



Maintain accurate documentation of patient interactions and provider schedules.



Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams and coordinate care with external providers.



Identify and communicate opportunities to improve patient care and service delivery.



Requirements



Degree in Psychology, Social Work, Healthcare Administration, Nursing, Pharmacist or a related field.



Minimum 5 years of experience as a Patient Advocate, Clinical Coordinator, or similar role.



Excellent English communication skills (C1 level).



Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to engage compassionately with diverse patient populations.



High attention to detail with strong organizational and documentation skills.



Knowledge of mental health conditions and treatment modalities (preferred).



Familiarity with telehealth platforms and virtual care technologies.



Ability to work independently and as part of a team of four, take the initiative, and maintain strict confidentiality.



This position is not focused on backend tasks; the candidate should be comfortable working one-on-one with doctors.



Availability to work from 9 AM to 6 PM EST, Monday–Friday or Sunday–Thursday.

title: Real Estate Lead Manager (Cold Calling/Lead Qualification/Appointment Setting)
description:

Join us and be a part of something extraordinary! Your journey to success starts here.

title: HR Assistant
description:
Location: 100% Remote 

Department: Human Resources

Reports To: Managing Director



About the Role



The HR Assistant supports the Human Resources department with both administrative HR operations and recruitment activities. This role is ideal for an experienced HR professional who is detail-oriented, service-driven, and motivated to continue growing across core HR functions. The HR Assistant helps ensure smooth HR processes, efficient hiring, and a positive personnel experience throughout the personnel lifecycle.



This is a remote position, and we welcome candidates who are passionate about people, process improvement, and collaborative teamwork.



Key Responsibilities



HR Operations & Administration:

Maintain accurate, up-to-date, and compliant personnel records within HR systems and personnel files.

Independently manage day-to-day HR administrative processes and documentation.

Support the implementation and consistent application of HR policies, procedures, and internal guidelines.

Assist with ensuring compliance with labor laws, company policies, and HR best practices.

Prepare and validate personnel data for payroll processing, including attendance, leave records, and personnel changes.

Support benefits and leave administration and serve as a first point of contact for routine personnel inquiries.

Support personnel separation processes, including coordinating exit documentation, system access removal, final payroll inputs, and exit interviews in line with company policy.

Coordinate performance review cycles, training initiatives, and personnel engagement activities.

Prepare HR reports, trackers, and documentation for management and audits as required.

Handle sensitive personnel information with discretion, professionalism, and confidentiality.



Recruitment & Talent Acquisition Support:

Partner with managers to understand staffing needs and role requirements.

Draft, post, and manage job advertisements across job boards, social media, and company career pages.

Screen resumes and conduct initial candidate interviews as needed.

Coordinate interview schedules and manage ongoing candidate communication and follow-ups.

Maintain and update the applicant tracking system and monitor recruitment metrics.

Support onboarding preparation and processes, including employment documentation and orientation coordination.

Contribute to improving recruitment workflows and candidate experience.



Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Psychology, or a related field.

1-2 years of relevant experience in Human Resources, with exposure to both HR operations and recruitment.

Working knowledge of HR processes, employment practices, and applicable labor regulations.

Strong interpersonal and communication skills with the ability to interact confidently with personnel and managers.

Proficiency in Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Slides), and hands-on experience using HR and recruitment tools such as Gusto, Indeed, LinkedIn, etc. 

Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities effectively.



Preferred Skills: 

Experience using sourcing platforms such as LinkedIn Recruiter, Indeed, or similar tools.

Ability to work independently while collaborating effectively with cross-functional teams.

Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.



Key Competencies: 

Professionalism and integrity

Accountability and ownership

Time management and prioritization

Adaptability and continuous learning

Strong personnel service mindset



Why Join Us

- 100% Remote Work Environment

- Supportive, people-first culture

- Opportunities for growth and professional development

- Employee recognition and engagement programs

title: Content Quality Analyst
description:
We’re hiring a Content Quality Analyst to help ensure the quality and consistency of web content across our firm’s website. This junior-level role is well-suited for someone who’s detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable working within legal subject matters. You should be confident reviewing content with a critical eye, open to learning, and willing to speak up when you spot issues or areas for improvement. You’ll also work with other teams to keep everything consistent and up to standard across the site. A legal background isn’t required, but the ability to understand legal concepts and apply established guidelines accurately is essential.



Key Responsibilities

-Review web content for legal marketing compliance, factual and conceptual accuracy, grammar, and readability.

-Conduct regular audits of web pages for both content and technical issues.

-Ensure SEO best practices are implemented throughout all content (keywords, meta tags, headers, etc.).

-Perform basic technical checks (e.g., internal links, alt text, metadata, formatting).

-Coordinate with different teams to ensure consistent application of content standards.

-Track content updates and maintain documentation of reviews and recommendations.

-Support the development of internal content standards and style guides.



Qualifications And Skills

-Excellent attention to detail and the ability to identify content inconsistencies or errors.

-Strong organizational and time management skills.

-Ability to follow complex editorial, legal, and brand standards accurately.

-Fast learner with the ability to adapt to legal content and digital platforms.

-Strong written communication and analytical skills.

-Familiarity with legal terminology, especially in the U.S. legal landscape (preferred).

-Understanding of basic website development concepts such as HTML tags and page structure (preferred).



Basic Requirements

-Device Specifications: Intel i5 processor or higher with a minimum of 8GB RAM

-Equipment: Webcam, speakers, and a microphone or headphones

-Internet Speed: Minimum of 100Mbps with a backup connection in case of outages



Work Details

Working Hours: Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 5:30 PM Pacific Standard Time | Tuesday to Saturday, 12 AM to 8:30 AM Manila Time



Location: Anywhere in the Philippines



Why Join Us?

-Stable employment

-Competitive salary

-Bi-monthly salary

-A-Z benefits, including bonuses and annual raises

-Work-life balance

-Work-from-home opportunity



If interested, kindly send your resume to 



Start Your Journey With Us

If you enjoy working behind the scenes to make sure content is clear, accurate, and up to standard, this role might be a strong match. You're the kind of person who notices the small things, like an awkward phrase, a broken link, a detail that doesn’t quite add up, and you take pride in getting it right. You’ll be part of a collaborative team that values quality and attention to detail, steady support, and room to grow in a stable, long-term role. If that sounds like the kind of environment you’re looking for, we’d like to hear from you.

title: Administrative Golf Travel & Booking Systems (with option to full time)
description:
About YouGolfTours

YouGolfTours is a boutique golf travel company specialised in high-quality, tailor-made golf journeys worldwide. We work with discerning clients, premium hotels, golf resorts and international partners, placing strong emphasis on service quality, precision and personal attention.



Our business model combines strong B2C outbound expertise in Switzerland with B2B inbound operations for Swiss golf travel. Our products cover FIT travel (individuals, couples and families), group travel with or without a golf professional, as well as incentive and corporate travel where business, golf and premium experiences are combined.



Role overview

We are looking for a reliable, structured and engaged administrative professional to support management and daily operations, with a strong focus on booking systems, website admin, CRM admin, coordination and communication. This role requires solid administrative experience who works independently, communicates confidently with international partners and understands executive-level organisation. Knowledge of the golf and tourism industry is essential to fully understand our products, workflows and client expectations.



Key responsibilities

You will support the management team with CRM, Website admin, CMS, system-related, booking and general administrative tasks and act as a central coordination point for internal and external communication. This includes handling
s and correspondence in English, preparing business and operational documents, managing data, supplier information and bookings, and supporting the organisation of travel arrangements, meetings and executive schedules. You will liaise with hotels, golf courses, airlines and partners, ensuring accuracy, follow-up and clear communication at all times. Maintaining structured records and supporting smooth operational processes will be a key part of your role.



Required profile

You are fluent in English, written and spoken, and confident in professional Web, online Admin and communication. You bring solid administrative experience, ideally within tourism, travel, hospitality or a comparable service-driven environment. You are highly organised, detail-oriented and comfortable managing multiple tasks simultaneously. A good understanding of the golf industry and the tourism business is important, as is experience with executive arrangements and high-level client coordination. You work independently, reliably and with a strong sense of responsibility.



What we offer

We offer a flexible part-time position with the possibility to work also Full Time after trial period, integration into a dynamic and specialised golf travel company, and close collaboration with management. You will be involved in high-quality international projects and premium client services. This is a purely administrative role. 



We are looking for a long-term collaboration based on engagement and mutual growth.

title: Full-Time YouTube Video Editor (Long-Form Content)
description:
HIRING: Full-Time YouTube Video Editor (Long-Form Content)



Remote / Overseas



We’re hiring a full-time YouTube editor to produce long-form videos for an entrepreneurship and business channel.

• Airbnb / Real Estate

• Consumer Product Brands

• Restaurants & Breweries

This is not a part-time editing role.

We are looking for someone who can own the editing process and help improve the storytelling of each video.



Please
 your resume and portfolio to apply.



What You’ll Do

What This Role Is NOT



? Not part-time

? Not a beginner role

You should already know how to edit engaging YouTube content.



What Success Looks Like

How to Apply

 1. A short summary of your YouTube editing experience

title: Senior WordPress & Webflow Website Developer
description:
Senior WordPress & Webflow Website Developer



Remote Work Requirements (Non-Negotiable)



* Work Hours: 9 AM–6 PM US CST, Monday–Friday

* Reliable Technology: Stable internet connection (?10 Mbps) and dedicated computer

* Hubstaff Usage: Time tracking and productivity monitoring required

* Video Meetings: Camera on for all video calls

* Full-Time Focus: No concurrent employment or freelance contracts



Job Title

Senior WordPress & Webflow Website Developer

Job Description

Buzz Digital Agency is seeking a highly skilled Senior WordPress & Webflow Website Developer to architect, build, and maintain client-facing websites. You’ll leverage both no-code/low-code platforms and custom front-end scripting to deliver polished, performance-optimized sites on time, every time. If you’re passionate about web craftsmanship and thrive in a remote environment, we want to hear from you!

Roles & Responsibilities



* Client Website Builds

* Architect, develop, and deliver fully responsive websites in WordPress (Elementor/Divi/ACF) and Webflow

* Configure themes, templates, custom fields, and page-builder layouts to match design comps

* Domain, Hosting & Deployment

* Manage DNS settings, SSL certificates, hosting environments (staging & production), and backups

* Oversee deployment workflows and rollback procedures

* Custom Front-End Enhancements

* Write clean, maintainable JavaScript, HTML, and CSS for animations, sliders, and form validations

* Implement lightweight scripts to extend CMS functionality without heavy back-end work

* Integrations & Automations

* Connect sites to
-marketing tools (Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign), CRMs (GoHighLevel), payment gateways, and Zapier/Integromat

* Configure and test webhooks and RESTful API calls for seamless data flow

* Performance, Security & SEO

* Optimize images, implement caching and minification for fast load times

* Ensure on-page SEO fundamentals are in place (meta tags, structured data, sitemap)

* Harden sites against common vulnerabilities (XSS, SQL injection, brute-force)

* Collaboration & Version Control

* Partner with designers, marketers, and PMs to translate requirements into scalable solutions

* Maintain code in Git, perform peer reviews, and uphold branching/merging workflows

* Quality Assurance & Maintenance

* Conduct manual (and where feasible, automated) testing to catch regressions

* Troubleshoot, debug, and provide post-launch support—including uptime monitoring and error-log reviews

* Documentation & Client Handoff

* Prepare step-by-step documentation and training materials for client site management

* Provide a 30-day post-launch support window and live handover sessions

* Continuous Improvement

* Research and recommend new tools or processes to boost efficiency and quality

* Share knowledge via internal demos or lunch-and-learn sessions







Nice-to-Have: Mentoring junior developers; experience with Jira/Trello; familiarity with Google Analytics/Tag Manager.

Qualifications



* 5+ years of professional experience in WordPress and Webflow website development

* Advanced skills with Elementor, Divi, ACF, and Webflow CMS

* Strong command of JavaScript, HTML, and CSS for front-end customizations

* Proven track record integrating third-party services via APIs and webhooks

* Deep understanding of DNS, SSL, hosting platforms, and deployment workflows

* Proficient with Git and collaborative development practices

* Excellent English communication—written and verbal

* Highly organized, detail-oriented, and self-motivated in a remote setting





Performance Review & Increase: After a 3-month probationary period and successful milestone delivery, we’ll conduct a formal review with the opportunity to increase base pay toward mid-market rates.



* Benefits & Perks

* Paid Time Off (PTO):

* Earn 40 hours of PTO after completing one full year of employment.

* After three years, your PTO increases to 60 hours annually.

* Unused PTO can roll over, up to a maximum of 80 hours.

* Paid Holidays:

Enjoy paid time off for all major U.S. holidays, including:

* New Year’s Eve & New Year’s Day

* Memorial Day

* Independence Day

* Labor Day

* Thanksgiving Day & the day after

* Christmas Eve & Christmas Day

* Performance Review & Salary Growth:

* Formal review after the 3-month probationary period

* Opportunity for base pay increase based on performance and milestone completion

* Remote Work Culture:

* 100% remote with structured hours and clear expectations

* Collaborative team culture with regular video calls and project alignment



How to Apply

Please submit via OnlineJobs.ph:



1. Your résumé/CV

2. Links to 3 live sites or repositories demonstrating your WordPress, Webflow, and custom JS/CSS work

3. A brief cover note outlining your role in each project and confirming your availability for 9 AM–6 PM US CST



Or submit into our applicant pipeline using this link: 
/forms/84726ed1ba31277ce11ad4495f9b8f6f?r=use1





We look forward to building exceptional websites together!

title: B2B Outreach Specialist (Part-time  or  full-time  opportunities)
description:
**Please read Before Applying**



**We are seeking experienced B2B cold callers only. Candidates must be confident on the phone and able to generate qualified leads within the first 30 days.***



IHRS is actively seeking a B2B Outreach & Lead Generation Specialist to support our growing business development efforts. This position will also be posted publicly on 
, but we are extending this opportunity directly to you first as a candidate who has already expressed interest in our company.



——————————————

POSITION: B2B OUTREACH & LEAD GENERATION SPECIALIST

——————————————



Engagement Type: Independent Contractor (1099) | Remote



This role is the engine behind IHRS client growth. You will be responsible for identifying prospective healthcare facility clients and organizations, executing outbound outreach, conducting follow-up calls, qualifying leads, and moving potential partners through our pipeline. This is a results-driven position — we are looking for someone who can demonstrate activity, track progress, and deliver outcomes.



What This Role Involves:



• Outbound cold calling and follow-up calls to healthcare facilities, agencies, and organizations

• Lead identification and prospecting using B2B tools, Google research, and provided software

• Following up on active
 campaigns with live phone outreach

• Qualifying leads and logging all activity into our CRM and tracking systems

• Submitting weekly call and lead reports every Friday

• Representing IHRS professionally in every interaction



——————————————

ENGAGEMENT OPTIONS & COMPENSATION

——————————————



We offer two engagement options to accommodate the right candidate:



Part-Time

• 6 hours per day | Monday through Friday

• 30 hours per week

• Base Rate: $500.00/month ( plus an additional $300.00  monthly incentive for every lead that is closed) on top of your base pay)

Hours: 9am -3pm (Eastern Standard Time)



Full-Time

• 7 hours per day | Monday through Friday

• 35 hours per week

• Base Rate: $600.00/month  ( plus an additional $300.00  monthly incentive for every lead that is closed) on top of your base pay)

Hours :9am - 4pm ( Eastern Standard Time)



Performance Incentive (Both Options)

• $300.00 bonus for every lead that converts into a confirmed IHRS client or partner

• This incentive applies from day one and is paid on top of your base rate



——————————————

60-DAY PROBATIONARY PERIOD

——————————————



The first 60 days of engagement serve as a probationary period. At the close of that period, a formal performance review will be conducted. Candidates who demonstrate consistent activity, measurable results, and alignment with IHRS standards will be considered for base pay increases and enhanced incentive structures. We invest in the people who invest in this company.



——————————————

WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

——————————————



The right candidate for this role does not just talk about what they can do — they show it. We are specifically looking for someone who brings:



• Demonstrated experience in B2B outreach, cold calling, or lead generation

• The ability to produce measurable results and report on activity with clarity

• Strong verbal communication and professional phone presence

• Reliability, integrity, and a consistent work ethic

• A goal-driven mindset with the discipline to execute daily without micromanagement

• A genuine team-player attitude and desire for long-term growth within the company

• Flexibility and adaptability — IHRS is a growing company and the right person will grow with us



——————————————

HOW TO APPLY

——————————————



If this opportunity interests you, please reply to this
 with the following:



1. Your updated resume or brief overview of your B2B and outreach experience



2. Your preferred engagement option (part-time or full-time)



3. Your availability to start



4. Answer the following question: What makes you the best candidate?



Contact us directly 


 

Website


 



Warm regards,

title: Graphic Designer / Online graphics for Amazon
description:
We, my wife and I run an online ecommerce company that sells on all platforms but focus on Amazon since it is the majority of our business. We are in need of a graphic designer to update our listing images and other graphic tasks such as -



Developing a template for new frame style of floating frames that will have our current inventory be placed into by another VA.   



We want to update the 9 listings photos for our 50 bestselling products. These will be highly scripted by chat output that would align them with the listing text to enhance SEO. These can use a combination of AI generated, free photo stock images and text to create the 9 product focused listing photos.



Creating new personalized canvas products for example have a graphic for kitchens and then have a personalization of Susan Kitchen be able to be placed in the graphic. 

Candidate needs to have extensive experience with Photoshop or InDesign and also a back ground with ai photo development.

title: Capcut / TikTok editor
description:
You will be editing and making Al videos using Al tools like Higgsfield.ai, Heygen, ElevenLabs, and VEO3. You will be generating video clips / Al characters talking and editing them in Capcut.



You will be trained extensively on how to do it, previous experience using CapCut is required but the other tools you don't need any experience in. It'll be mostly just providing scripts to an Al tool and then adding the voice to a capcut video. It's quite easy once you get the hang of it, which we'll train you to do!



IMPORTANT: To apply, please re-create this viral video using the following services and attach to your application: ---------- /t/ZT6cdHxTC/



1) Create an image similar to the one in the video attached above in Google Gemini (this is free)

2) Download the transcript from the video with this tool: www.submagic.co/tools/tiktok-transcript-generator

3) Create a free ElevenLabs account and run the script through ElevenLabs. Ensure the audio sounds realistic to the speaker's voice in the image you generated. Download the MP3.

4) Create a free HeyGen account. Using HeyGen, upload the MP3 as well as your image to generate the video.

5) Download the final file, add captions and text hooks just like in the viral video using Capcut and export.



Please attach these things in your application:

The google drive link to your Final Recreate Assignment (Make sure it's public or a link with access)



Requirements for the job:

Attention to detail

STRONG English

Strong internet connection

Previous experience with Capcut / TikTok / Instagram

Good working with a team

Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

Can work 8am - 5pm Manila time

Availability for 6-8h a day (never more, sometimes less)

Able to work 6 per week (can take days off whenever needed as long as mostly consistent)

Can take payments through Wise

PH or similar time zone



2nd test)



1) Create an image similar to the video (Go to Google Labs (Flow) VEO3), you can use nano banana pro 2.

2) Using that image animate the same video linked but as your own avatar.

2) Create an exact copy with the same setting but different face. 

3) Visual and text should sound identical. Both scripts should sound the same. (If he points up, your character should point up). 


==

title: We’re Hiring: Remote Appointment Setter / Lead Qualifier (High-Performance Role)
description:
Location: 100% Remote (Work From Home)

Type: Full-Time | 40 Hours/Week (Eastern Standard Time)



About Us



At DamEasy Flood Barriers, we design and manufacture innovative flood protection systems that help property owners safeguard their homes and businesses. Headquartered in Ireland, we serve customers worldwide with a strong focus on the U.S.—especially across Florida.



As we continue to grow, we are looking for a highly driven Appointment Setter / Lead Qualifier who thrives in a fast-paced environment and knows how to turn inbound interest into booked, qualified appointments.



Role Overview



This is not a closing role—your primary mission is to qualify leads and book appointments for our sales team.



You will be the first point of contact for inbound prospects, ensuring every lead is properly vetted, consistently followed up, and scheduled. This role is ideal for someone who is process-driven, detail-oriented, and relentless on the phone—a true call machine who also demonstrates strong judgment and takes ownership of both follow-ups and admin tasks.



Key Responsibilities

Engage with inbound leads via phone, SMS, and
 with urgency and professionalism

Follow a structured pre-qualification process to assess customer fit

Ask the right questions, gather accurate information, and filter high-quality opportunities

Book qualified appointments for the sales team across Florida

Execute consistent follow-ups (calls, texts,
s) to maximize booking rates and reduce no-shows

Maintain accurate and up-to-date records in the CRM (GoHighLevel preferred)

Handle essential admin tasks including data entry, pipeline updates, and appointment confirmations

Ensure a smooth and organized handoff to the sales team

Meet and exceed daily/weekly activity and booking targets

What We’re Looking For

Proven experience in appointment setting, lead qualification, or high-volume calling roles

Strong communication skills with a clear, confident American accent

Ability to strictly follow scripts and qualification frameworks while sounding natural

Strong follow-up discipline and attention to detail

Demonstrates excellent judgment, practical thinking, and the ability to handle situations with minimal supervision

Comfortable managing both high call volume and admin/CRM responsibilities

Highly organized, self-motivated, and results-driven

Resilient, energetic, and thrives in a performance-based environment

What We Offer

100% remote work environment

Competitive base salary + performance-based bonuses

Warm inbound leads only – no cold calling

Full CRM system with automation and VoIP tools

Structured training on product, process, and qualification standards

Opportunity to grow within a high-performing, results-driven team

Schedule

Full-Time: 40 hours/week

Working Hours: Eastern Standard Time (EST)

How to Apply



If you are a results-driven appointment setter who thrives on calls, follows processes, excels at follow-ups, and takes ownership of admin responsibilities, we want to hear from you.



Please send your updated CV along with a short video introduction to 

Note: Applications without a video will not be considered.



We look forward to meeting candidates who are ready to perform at a high level and grow with us.

title: VIDEO CLIPPER — 60,000 PHP/MONTH
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM (Philippine Time)

- 60,000 PHP/month after the first month + performance-based bonuses

You will extract short, high-value clips from a YouTube channel.



Your main responsibility is to:



- Watch long-form YouTube videos

- Deeply understand our target audience (pain points, goals, objections)

- Identify valuable, engaging, and on-brand 
nts

title: AI Real Estate Video Creation- Social Media Director
description:
We don't hire closers. We hire people who give a damn.



We are Nexus Motion Studios. Real estate agents send us their listing photos and we deliver 12 professional videos by the next afternoon — vertical for Reels and TikTok, horizontal for 
 and
. One upload. Done by tomorrow.



Here's how we think about sales:



Every agent you talk to is running a business. They're trying to win listings, impress clients, and stand out in a market full of agents doing the same thing. Our job is not to sell them something — it's to genuinely help them. That means every conversation adds value whether they buy or not. Share a tip about what's working on listing videos right now. Tell them what makes a Reel actually get views. Point them in the right direction even if that direction isn't us.



The agents who feel helped become customers. The ones who become customers come back. The ones who come back refer others. That's the business we're building.



If it's not the right fit we say so and move on. We would rather lose a sale than damage someone's trust.



That mindset is non-negotiable here. If you're motivated purely by closing numbers this is not the right role.



If you believe that doing right by the customer is what builds a real business — keep reading.



What you do daily:

— Send 100+ outreach messages to agents via Instagram, LinkedIn, and

— Use our AI tool to personalize every message in 30 seconds

— Have real conversations — not scripts

— Share example videos and let the work speak for itself

— Give value in every interaction whether they order or not

— Follow up with patience until they're ready — or not

— Move every lead through GoHighLevel CRM



You are the right fit if:

— You believe the best sale is one where the customer wins

— You have sales, BPO, or outreach experience

— You already use at least one AI tool regularly

— You follow up every day without being chased

— You work independently and take ownership

— Strong written English is non-negotiable



Details:

— Full time 40hrs/week

— $6/hr paid weekly via Wise

— Monday to Friday

— All tools provided

— Applicants must be ok with VPN



One question to answer before we move forward:



You've been talking to an agent for 3 days. They're excited, ready to order, and they just sent you their photos. You open the folder and the images are dark, blurry, and taken on a phone — not professional photos. *AI ANSWERS WILL BE DELETED* You know the videos will look bad and won't represent the listing well. Your weekly numbers are low. What do you do — and be specific about exactly what you say to them.



Documentation scores of 80-100 Accepted only



Nexus Motion Studios

title: Social Media Video Scheduler & Uploader
description:
We're a personal branding agency that has helped clients generate millions of views over the past 3 years. We work with founders and business owners to turn their expertise into content that builds their brand and drives real results.



We're looking for a detail oriented Video Scheduler & Uploader to make sure every client's content goes out on time, every single day without fail across both short form and YouTube.



???? WHAT YOU'LL DO



• Access our Drive and download approved videos for each client

• Upload videos to our scheduling platform and set them up for posting for both short form (Reels) and long form (YouTube)

• Write captions, add hashtags, and include CTAs tailored to each client

• Schedule content in advance so nothing is ever delayed

• Ensure every client's posts go live on the correct platforms every day

• Stay organized across multiple clients and keep everything running smoothly



? WHO YOU ARE



• Highly organized and detail oriented nothing slips through the cracks

• Comfortable working inside scheduling and content management tools

• Familiar with social media platforms and how content gets posted

• Able to write clean, on brand captions with proper hashtags and CTAs

• Reliable and consistent clients are counting on daily posts going up

• A team player who communicates well and takes ownership of their role



???? WHY WORK WITH US



We'll train you on exactly how we operate, our clients, and our standards. This is a role where consistency and reliability matter most if you're someone who takes pride in keeping things organized and on schedule, you'll thrive here.



If you're detail driven, dependable, and want to be part of a growing agency let's talk.

title: Social Media Video Reviewer
description:
We're a personal branding agency that has helped clients generate millions of views over the past 3 years. We work with founders and business owners to turn their expertise into content that grows their brand and gets real results.



As we scale, we're looking for a Video Reviewer who understands what makes content perform on both Instagram Reels and YouTube and can help us keep our quality high across every client.



???? WHAT YOU'LL DO



• Review edited videos from our editing team before they go live both short form (Reels) and long form (YouTube)

• Check for typos, color, audio, formatting, and overall quality

• Suggest improvements titles, hooks, clip sequencing, on-screen elements based on what's currently trending

• Stay up to date with what's performing on Instagram Reels and YouTube right now

• Understand pacing and structure for both short and long form so viewers stay engaged

• Approve final videos once they meet our standards



? WHO YOU ARE



• You understand what makes both short and long form content perform

• You're constantly watching content across Instagram and YouTube and know what's trending

• You have an eye for detail (typos, color grading, audio levels)

• You understand clip sequencing and pacing for different formats

• You have opinions and you're not afraid to share them constructively

• You're a team player who wants to do great work with good people

• You're coachable and open to learning how we operate



???? WHY WORK WITH US



We've been doing this for 3 years, we know what works, and we'll train you on our process and standards. This isn't a role where you just check boxes we want your input. If you see something that could make a video better, we want to hear it.



If you love content, care about quality, and want to be part of a growing team let's talk.

title: Expert SEO Specialist •  High-Impact Campaigns •  20+ Benefits & Bonuses
description:
Our prominent injury law firm in California is looking for an SEO Specialist. Would you be interested?



We’re seeking an SEO Coordinator to join our dynamic team in the legal industry. The ideal candidate will be passionate about utilizing search engine optimization techniques to improve conversions, traffic, and brand revenue. You will work closely with our content marketing and development teams to implement the organic strategy and play a key role in identifying new opportunities to improve organic performance. This position requires excellent organizational and problem-solving skills, a curiosity to learn, and solid communication, interpersonal, and collaboration skills.



-Develop optimization strategies that increase the company’s website search engine results from rankings.

-Execute tests, collect and analyze data and results, and identify trends and insights to achieve maximum ROI.

-Closely collaborate with the web development team to ensure SEO best practices are followed adequately throughout the website content.

-Work with editorial and marketing teams to drive SEO in content creation and marketing.

-Take responsibility for page optimization for search engine marketing.

-Perform ongoing keyword research, discovery, and optimization for new relevant keywords to use throughout the company website and marketing materials.

-Research and implement search engine optimization recommendations

-Create and execute a link-building strategy.

-Change website architecture, content, linking, and other factors to improve SEO positions for target keywords

-Determine measurable goals that demonstrate improvement in marketing efforts.

-Monitor daily performance metrics with SEO tools like Google Analytics to understand SEO strategy performance.

-Collaborate with others within the marketing department to manage SEO strategy.

-Write compelling and high-quality website content, including blog posts and page descriptions, to improve website search results.



*** The company uses a time tracker and maintains a virtual office setup via Google Meet.



We offer:

-Graveyard shift (From Tuesday to Saturday | 12:00 AM-8:30 AM Manila Time)

-Competitive and bi-weekly salary

-15+ company benefits, including annual raises and bonuses.



For interested applicants kindly send your CV to 



(Note: DO NOT SEND YOUR APPLICATION through our websites or social media platforms. FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THIS INSTRUCTION may result in DISQUALIFICATION)

title: Kickstart Your Career: Outreach Specialist  — Full-Time — 20+ Benefits
description:
We are looking for an Outreach Specialist who can help us enhance our online presence and boost organic search visibility. In this role, you will build and nurture relationships with web admins through strategic and creative outreach activities. This position requires a keen eye for detail, strong practical judgment, problem-solving abilities, excellent communication skills, and a methodical approach to our link-building efforts.

 

Key Responsibilities:

-Qualify websites and identify backlink opportunities from high-ranking, authoritative websites.

-Reach out to bloggers and website owners, acquire guest post placements, and perform necessary outreach.

-Develop and execute creative strategies to acquire backlinks to positively impact organic search visibility.

-Analyze and ensure a healthy backlink profile.

-Generate new content ideas based on the competitive landscape.

-Assign article topics and work with our content team to create engaging content.

-Analyze competitor backlinks.

-Stay current on the latest updates on link building and SEO trends.



Qualifications And Skills:

-Prior experience in the same role

-In-depth knowledge of guest posting and resource link-building strategies

-Proficiency with industry-standard tools such as Majestic, Semrush, Ahrefs, Moz, and Buzzstream

-Working knowledge of Google Suite (Gmail, Docs, Sheets)

-Strong ability to analyze datasets, identify key trends, and derive actionable insights to improve outreach strategies

-Exceptional attention to detail

-Self-starter who can work independently and manage time effectively

-Excellent written and verbal communication skills

-Genuine passion for digital marketing

-Willingness to share new ideas and contribute to the continuous improvement of outreach strategies

-Hard-working team player with a collaborative mindset



Basic Requirements:

-Device Specifications: Intel i5 processor or higher with a minimum of 8GB RAM

-Equipment: Webcam, speakers, and a microphone or headphones

-Internet Speed: Minimum of 100Mbps with a backup connection for outages



Work Details:

Working Hours: Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 5:30 PM Pacific Standard Time | Tuesday to Saturday, 12 AM to 8:30 AM Manila Time

Location: Anywhere in the Philippines



Why Join Us?

-Stable employment

-Competitive salary

-Bi-monthly salary

-A-Z benefits, including bonuses and annual raises

-Work-life balance 

-Work-from-home opportunity



*** The company uses a time tracker and maintains a virtual office setup via Google Meet.





For interested applicants kindly send your CV to 



(Note: DO NOT SEND YOUR APPLICATION through our websites or social media platforms. FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THIS INSTRUCTION may result in DISQUALIFICATION)

title: WFH Opportunity: Social Media Marketer
description:
We are seeking a social media marketer to manage and grow our Reddit advertising campaigns. This role will focus on building, testing, and optimizing ads that generate qualified leads for our law firm. The ideal candidate understands paid social, audience targeting, copywriting, creative testing, and performance optimization..



This role requires someone who is data-driven, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple campaigns while continuously improving performance.



Responsibilities

* Manage Reddit ad campaigns from launch through optimization

* Write ad copy tailored to different subreddit audiences

* Help develop creative concepts and ad visuals

* Test headlines, copy, images, and calls to action

* Monitor performance and improve CTR, conversions, and lead quality

* Identify new subreddits and audience opportunities

* Report on results and provide actionable recommendations

* Collaborate with internal teams on messaging and landing pages



Qualifications

- Experience in paid social, digital advertising, or performance marketing

- Reddit ads experience preferred

- Strong copywriting and audience targeting skills

- Comfortable analyzing campaign data and making optimizations

- Experience with lead generation campaigns preferred

- Organized, detail-oriented, and able to move quickly



Preferred

*** Experience in legal, local service, or high-intent lead generation

*** Familiarity with Reddit culture and platform behavior

*** Experience with Meta Ads or Google Ads is a plus



TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

-Computer: Intel i5 processor (or better) with at least 8GB RAM

-Equipment: Webcam, microphone, and headset or speakers

-Internet: Minimum 100 Mbps stable connection with a backup internet source



WORK SCHEDULE & LOCATION

-Schedule: Tuesday–Saturday, 12:00 AM–8:30 AM Manila Time

-Location: Remote—open to candidates based in the Philippines



WHY WORK WITH US?

-Long-term and stable position

-Competitive pay with bi-monthly payouts

-Comprehensive benefits, bonuses, and annual salary reviews

-Work-from-home setup promoting work-life balance

-Supportive remote work environment using Google Meet and time tracking tools

-Collaborative team culture with strong growth opportunities



Ready to Apply?

Send your resume to 



(Note: DO NOT SEND YOUR APPLICATION through our website. FAILURE TO COMPY WITH THIS INSTRUCTION may result to DISQUALIFICATION)

description:

mbers to provide updates and status reports.

-Familiarity with legal software platforms such as Filevine is a plus

-Strong organizational and analytical skills with attention to detail.

-Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

-Ability to work independently in a remote environment and manage multiple tasks efficiently.



Ideal Candidate

-Prior experience as a Discovery Paralegal, E-Discovery Specialist, or Litigation Support VA.

-Knowledge of legal terminology, workflows, and document management.

-Quick learner, adaptable, and comfortable with technology-driven processes.

title: Tech Ops and Automation Manager: $1,500–$2,000 USD PER MONTH
description:
Start rate: $1,500–$2,000 per month (based on experience)

Paid once per month via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.



If you’re someone who wants to take full ownership and build systems that scale, this role is for you!



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours per week (Flexible hours)

- Long-term stability: Not a short-term freelance contract.

- Stable monthly income: On-time payments via Wise

- Growth path: Opportunity to take full ownership of our tech stack

- High impact: Your systems directly affect revenue, retention, and team efficiency

- Supportive environment: No micromanagement, high ownership culture

- Tools provided: We cover the software you need



YOUR IMPACT



Your work reduces manual admin work.

Your systems improve onboarding and fulfillment speed.

Your dashboards increase visibility into performance metrics.

Your automations help the company scale cleanly.

You do not just build workflows.

You build infrastructure.



TASKS



Systems & Automation

- Build and manage advanced Airtable systems (multi-table databases, linked records, dashboards, KPIs)

- Create and maintain automations using 
, Zapier, and n8n

- Set up Slack automations (channel creation, alerts, routing, reminders, triggers)

- Connect tools across the company (CRM, forms, surveys, Slack, Airtable, Kajabi)

- Monitor automations daily and proactively fix issues

- Reduce manual processes across departments

- Kajabi & Fulfillment Support

- Manage Kajabi automations (onboarding flows, tagging, access control,
 triggers)

- Automate client onboarding (intake - Slack access - CRM tracking - milestone tracking)

- Improve fulfillment systems with dashboards, alerts, and progress tracking

- Build reporting for activation, retention, churn, revenue, and team performance



Architecture & Optimization

- Suggest better system structures as we grow

- Document all workflows clearly

- Build scalable foundations instead of temporary fixes

- Own and protect our automation infrastructure



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken)

- Advanced Airtable experience

- Advanced 
 experience

- Experience with Slack automations and integrations

- Experience with Zapier

- Strong understanding of APIs and webhooks

- Strong systems thinking (you think in architecture, not tasks)

- Ability to translate business problems into technical solutions

- Proactive mindset and high ownership

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace



STRONG PLUS



- n8n experience

- Kajabi automation experience

- CRM integrations (Close is a plus)

- Experience building KPI dashboards

- Experience supporting onboarding and fulfillment workflows

- Experience in fast-growing online businesses

- Experience with 7–9 figure digital brands



WHY JOIN US?



- $1,500–$2,000 per month based on experience

- Long-term stability

- High ownership role

- Direct impact on company growth

- Clear opportunity to become Head of Systems / Automation Lead

- Work with a fast-moving digital company

- All tools and software covered



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with “TECH OPS” as the message title

2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV

#2: Your years of experience with Airtable

#3: Your years of experience with 

#4: Your experience with n8n (if any)

#5: A short description of the most advanced system you have built

#6: One sentence on why you are a strong fit for this role



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



We look forward to building scalable systems with you.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: VIDEO CLIPPER — 60,000 PHP/MONTH
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM (Philippine Time)

- 60,000 PHP/month after the first month + performance-based bonuses

- 40,000 PHP during the first (test) month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise

- Fully remote position

- Young, supportive team

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will extract short, high-value clips from a YouTube channel.



Your main responsibility is to:



- Watch long-form YouTube videos

- Deeply understand our target audience (pain points, goals, objections)

- Identify valuable, engaging, and on-brand 
nts

- Select clips that align with our short-form SOPs

- Turn them into 15–45 second Instagram Reels

- Add clean and accurate subtitles

- Ensure smooth audio

- Deliver 2–3 clips per day



You are not creating content from scratch.

You are selecting and packaging the best parts — strategically.



TASKS



- Clip 2–3 short videos per day (15–45 seconds each)

- Follow our short-form SOPs consistently

- Select clips based on audience relevance and brand alignment

- Clearly explain your thought process when submitting clips:

- Ensure subtitles are accurate and easy to understand

- Ensure a smooth audio experience

- Review your work carefully before submitting



Note: There may be additional small tasks as needed.



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above)

- Strong understanding of audience psychology and content-market fit

- Ability to follow and execute based on SOPs

- Previous experience in short-form editing or video clipping

- Strong judgment for identifying valuable, on-brand content

- Detail-oriented with critical thinking skills

- Ability to work independently while staying communicative

- Efficient and solution-focused mindset



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Fill in the application form and record a Loom introducing yourself:




/to/v0OA9cFs



Important note: Put “VC” + [Your Name & Family Name] in the “Name” field.



ROUND 2: Paid test task. You will receive long-form videos and create short clips in the same style.



MORE ABOUT US



Young Publisher:

title: Website Developer
description:
Request for proposals for rebuild of the MPM Wealth Advisors website. This site is currently hosted on a platform called FMG Suite, which historically has had poor site speed and SEO.  



The new site should be rebuilt following the current design, but it should be optimized for speed and generative engine optimization, as well as making it easy to update and maintain the site. 



The site offer one integrations with CRM tools, for example, Redtail, Google Analytics, and
 providers like Mailchimp. 

Please submit detailed proposals, including your approach, preferred platforms (for example, Web Flow or WordPress), budget, and how you have built sites like these in the past. Especially addressing issues about SEO and GEO. 



My preference would be Wordpress and Elementor. I tested a new AI tool that makes Wordpress builds very fast. But would still need help with things like Mailchimp integration and other APIs.




 



The site FMG suite is a platform that has a lot of content. All of those links you shared would be lost in the transfer. So you'd just need to rebuild a few pages - about, team, retirement, wealth-building, contact, and home. And then be able to build a resource library and blog section.



Experience with financial websites and compliance a plus.

Experience with AI web-building tools a plus.

title: Paraplanner (Remote | Full-Time) – Financial Services Support
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Paraplanner to support our financial planning team remotely. This role is ideal for someone with strong analytical skills, experience in financial documentation, and a high level of accuracy in preparing client-ready reports.



About the Role



As a Paraplanner, you will work closely with our Financial Planner/Advisor to prepare, review, and complete Statement of Advice (SOA) documents, research financial products, and ensure all advice documentation is compliant and accurate.



You will play a key role in supporting smooth client servicing and high-quality financial planning delivery.



Key Responsibilities:



* Prepare and draft Statements of Advice (SOAs) and Records of Advice (ROAs)

* Conduct product and strategy research (superannuation, insurance, investments, etc.)

* Summarise client financial data and prepare recommendations

* Ensure compliance with financial regulations and internal standards

* Review client files for accuracy and completeness

* Work closely with the Financial Planner to refine advice documents

* Maintain confidentiality of all client information



Requirements:



* Previous experience as a Paraplanner or in a similar financial planning support role

* Strong understanding of financial planning concepts and Australian financial services (preferred)

* Experience with Xplan or similar financial planning software is an advantage

* Excellent attention to detail and strong written communication skills

* Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

* High level of professionalism and confidentiality

title: Operations Coordinator
description:
About LineGear

LineGear supplies PPE, uniforms, and equipment to fire departments and wildland firefighters across California. Our customers include municipal fire departments, state agencies, and individual firefighters.

LineGear serves government fire agencies and operates in a compliance-sensitive procurement environment where accuracy in PO documentation and vendor records is critical.

This role is best suited for candidates who enjoy operations, organization, and managing order workflows.



Role Overview

The Operations Coordinator owns the operational workflow of orders and vendor purchasing, ensuring orders move efficiently through Quote > Sales Order > Purchase Order

This role supports the sales team by ensuring orders are processed accurately, vendors are coordinated, and operational systems remain organized and audit-ready. The position is primarily internal operations and does not require phone support.



Key Responsibilities

Quote Preparation

Prepare draft quotes and sales orders inside QuickBooks Desktop. Tasks include:

- Creating sales orders and verifying product SKUs

- Checking inventory availability and applying standard pricing rules

- Estimating vendor lead times

- Quotes are reviewed and sent to customers by the sales team.



Sales Order Processing

Manage incoming customer orders and ensure they are processed correctly, with same-day entry as the target SLA. Responsibilities include:

- Creating and updating sales orders

- Verifying order quantities, details, and inventory availability

- Identifying items requiring purchase orders



Uniform Order Processing

Monitor the inbox 
 include:

- Reviewing incoming uniform orders and entering them into the uniform tracking spreadsheet

- Verifying quantities, checking inventory availability

- Creating purchase orders when items are not in stock

- Tracking vendor shipments through to fulfillment



Purchase Order Management

Create and send purchase orders to vendors in accordance with the authority guidelines.

Additional responsibilities include:

- Reviewing sales orders for inventory shortages before issuing POs

- Confirming vendor receipt of each PO

- Recording expected ship dates and tracking numbers

- Monitoring backorders and flagging delays

Purchase orders should generally be created only against confirmed sales orders, unless instructed otherwise by management.



Vendor Coordination

Communicate with vendors regarding order status and shipments. Vendor follow-up should occur within 3 business days of any open item. Tasks include:

- Confirming PO receipt and requesting shipment updates

- Recording tracking numbers and monitoring vendor lead times

- Escalating vendor delays to the manager via Slack, Teams, or daily
 update



Vendor File & Data Management

Maintain accurate vendor information across company systems, including:

- Vendor contact lists and pricing lists

- Product catalogs and vendor lead time notes

Vendor information should be organized within QuickBooks vendor records, shared Google Drive folders, and internal pricing spreadsheets.



Order Status Research

Assist the internal team with order status inquiries. Tasks include:

- Checking inventory availability and verifying vendor shipment status

- Confirming expected delivery dates and providing internal updates to the team



Product & Pricing Data Maintenance

Maintain internal product data to support quoting and purchasing:

- Updating vendor pricing, maintaining SKU data, organizing product information

- Tracking vendor lead times and flagging changes



SOP Documentation

Create and maintain written standard operating procedures (SOPs) for all recurring tasks within this role. Responsibilities include:

- Documenting step-by-step workflows for order entry, PO issuance, vendor follow-up, and uniform order processing

- Updating SOPs when processes change

- Maintaining SOPs in a shared Google Drive folder accessible to the manager

SOP documentation ensures operational continuity and is a standing expectation of the role, not a one-time task.



Tools Used

The Operations Coordinator will work primarily in:

- QuickBooks Desktop (accessed via Remote Desktop — see required skills)

- Google Sheets and Google Drive

- Shared
 inboxes

- Slack and/or Microsoft Teams



Work Schedule

Full-time position, 40 hours per week, aligned with U.S. Pacific Time business hours.



Location Hours

Philippines Approximately 12:00 AM – 8:00 AM PHT

California (PT) Approximately 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM PT



Exact hours may vary slightly depending on operational needs.



Required Skills

- QuickBooks Desktop experience — required. Candidates with QuickBooks Online experience only will need to demonstrate ability to learn QBD quickly. Access is provided via Remote Desktop; a stable, high-speed internet connection is required.

- Strong written English

- Excellent attention to detail

- Strong spreadsheet skills (Excel or Google Sheets)

- Ability to follow and document structured processes

- Ability to manage multiple tasks and open orders simultaneously



Preferred Experience

Candidates with experience in the following areas are preferred:

- Operations coordination, procurement, or purchasing

- Logistics support or order management

- Inventory tracking in a distribution or product-based business

- B2B or government procurement environments



Compensation & Reporting

Starting compensation: $800/month

This role reports directly to Owner



Application Instructions

To confirm that you carefully read this job description, please include the word:

FIRELINE

in the first sentence of your application. Applications without this word may not be reviewed.



Send your application to 
 the following questions in your
 and attach a resume for review.

1. Why are you the perfect fit for this role? Please include any examples of your previous work or projects that demonstrate your expertise.

2. Considering the diverse responsibilities of this role, which parts are you most comfortable or excited with? Which parts will you still need to master?

3. Have you worked for foreign employers before? What specific days and hours have you worked in the past?
