title: Marketing manager
description:
Job Title: Marketing Manager (experience caravans )



Role Overview



The Marketing Manager is responsible for planning, executing, and managing all marketing activities to generate leads, increase brand awareness, and drive sales. This role focuses on delivering measurable results, managing campaigns, and improving return on investment (ROI).





Key Responsibilities



1. Strategy & Planning

   •   Develop and implement marketing strategies aligned with business goals

   •   Plan monthly and quarterly campaigns

   •   Set clear KPIs (leads, cost per lead, conversions, revenue)

   •   Manage marketing budget effectively





2. Lead Generation & Sales Support

   •   Generate high-quality leads (not just volume)

   •   Monitor lead quality and conversion rates

   •   Work closely with sales team to improve closing rates

   •   Fix issues like “many leads but no sales”





3. Digital Marketing

   •   Manage campaigns across:

      •  ?
 / Instagram Ads you tube tik tok

      •   Google Ads

      •  ?
 marketing

   •   Optimise ads to reduce cost per lead

   •   Track and improve ROI on all campaigns





4. Content & Branding

   •   Oversee website, social media, and content

   •   Ensure consistent brand message

   •   Manage photos, videos, and product listings

   •   Promote key products (e.g. caravan models, layouts, stock)





5. Analytics & Reporting

   •   Track performance weekly:

      •   Leads generated

      •   Cost per lead

      •   Conversion rate

   •   Provide clear reports to management

   •   Identify what is working and what 



Key Skills & Experience

   •   Proven experience in lead generation marketing

   •   Strong knowledge of
 Ads & Google Ads ect

   •   Ability to analyse data and improve performance

   •   Experience working with sales teams

   •   Results-driven mindset (focus on revenue, not just activity)



KPIs (Very Important)



You should clearly define success:

   •   Cost per lead target (e.g. $10-25 depending on product)

   •   Lead-to-sale conversion rate

   •   Monthly sales generated from marketing

   •   ROI on ad spend

   •   Website traffic & engagement

title: Senior Creative Designer / Art Director
description:
About Us



We're a small growing creative agency working with CPG brands. We handle their entire creative production: branding, print and digital campaigns, e-commerce visuals, social media assets, AI-powered content, and more.



We work as an embedded creative team, delivering high-quality work through a streamlined Kanban workflow with fast turnarounds.



We're currently 2 (myself and a graphic designer) and looking to grow the team. Preference for CET-compatible timezones.



The Role



We are looking for a Senior Creative Designer with strong art direction skills. You will focus on creative execution: designing, producing, and polishing high-quality assets across branding, print, digital, and AI-powered workflows.



We need someone with 5 to 10 years of experience in graphic design, art direction, or creative production. You take ownership of your work, check every detail, and deliver assets that are ready to go live without supervision.



You will receive briefs from the team lead or directly from clients if proven communication ability, and focus on producing excellent creative work. Communication happens internally via Discord and Linear.



What You Will Do



Brand Identity & Print Design: Create and refine logos, brand identities, and visual systems. Design retail advertising (posters, POS, flyers, business cards), product catalogs, lookbooks, and packaging layouts. You must be comfortable preparing print-ready files following printer requirements (bleeds, trim marks, color standards). Build 360 web campaigns for product launches and brand activations, with strong knowledge of common web ratios and standards.



Digital & Campaign Design: Design ad creatives, social media assets,
 templates, e-commerce product pages, and banner kits. Ensure all visuals are on-brand, properly sized, and conversion-focused.



AI Visual Production: Use AI-powered tools to generate product lifestyle scenes, virtual try-ons, UGC-style content, product video sequences, and high-volume creative variations. Write effective prompts and work with generative image and video models (Runway, Kling, Flux, Nano Banana, Vemo, Seedance, etc.). Experience with Freepik Space for AI campaign production (outfit generation, scene building, content creation) is a big plus. If you haven't used this specific tool, you must be the type of person who learns new tools on a regular basis. This is a fast-paced, constantly evolving industry.



Quality Control: This is one of the most important parts of the job. You proofread every single text. You verify every dimension. You check every alignment. You make sure the deliverable matches the brief exactly. You re-check your own work multiple times before anything goes out. If you are not naturally obsessive about details, this role is not for you.



Required Skills



- Expert-level Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, and InDesign. Figma is used for teamwork and presentations but no special experience is required.

- Hands-on experience with AI image/video generation. Strong prompting skills. Familiarity with generative models and AI creative workflows.

- Strong eye for composition, typography, color, and layout. Knowledge of photography principles. Natural affinity with fashion, lifestyle, and consumer brand aesthetics.

- Obsessive about accuracy. Typos, misaligned elements, and wrong dimensions are unacceptable to you.

- Professional English (written).



Nice to Have



Experience working with fashion, footwear, or CPG brands. Portfolio showing retail advertising, campaign visuals, or AI-generated brand content. Experience with UGC content creation or AI campaign production pipelines (e.g. Freepik Space). Motion design or short-form video editing skills. Knowledge of no-code website builders such as Framer or Webflow.



What We Provide



All software licenses: Adobe Creative Cloud, Figma, AI tools, and platform subscriptions. You work on your own computer. This is a long-term, stable position with a growing agency. You will work directly with the founder and creative director, who has 20+ years of experience in art direction for global brands.



SSS, PhilHealth, and Pag-IBIG contributions covered. 13th month pay included.



How to Apply



Send your portfolio link and a short message explaining why this role is a good fit for you. Include examples of AI-generated visuals or campaign work if you have them. We value quality of work over length of CV.

title: Video Editor for Short-Form Content (Instagram Reels / TikTok / YouTube Shorts)
description:
We are looking for a video editor to help create short-form content for a marketing agency (EntreDupe).



The editing style is similar to: Instagram creators 
 (fast-paced, engaging, caption-heavy videos)



You will be editing talking head videos into high-quality, engaging short-form content.



Responsibilities:

- Cut and edit talking head videos (30–60 seconds)

- Create fast-paced, engaging edits

- Add animated captions/subtitles

- Add sound effects (SFX) and music

- Use jump cuts and transitions

- Apply light color grading

- Follow current short-form trends (IG Reels / Shorts)



Requirements:

- Experience editing short-form content

- Strong understanding of pacing and retention

- Ability to create animated captions (important)

- Familiar with trends on Instagram / YouTube Shorts

- DaVinci Resolve preferred (or similar software)

- Reliable and responsive



Work Details:

- 10 hours per week

- $2/hour

- Work anytime (flexible schedule)

- Work across 2–3 days per week (or flexible)

- Must check in during work days and provide updates/drafts if needed



Expected Output: ~4–6 short-form videos per week



To Apply, Please include:

- Portfolio of short-form videos you’ve edited

- 2–3 examples with captions and effects

- Tell us Your editing software

- Tell us Your favorite short-form content creator (and why)



Example:

title: Jr. Creative Designer
description:
Sonder Collective is a creative-led performance agency working with DTC and eCommerce brands on Meta and TikTok.



We’re looking for a Junior Creative Designer (Paid Ads) who can consistently execute high-quality ad creatives and communicate reliably during working hours.



This is a flexible, output-based role. Work is assigned in batches with clear deadlines.



What You’ll Do

Create paid ad creatives for Meta and TikTok

Work on a mix of:

Static images

Carousel ads

Short-form video creatives (AI-assisted is allowed)

Execute based on clear briefs (angle, concept, direction provided)

Deliver work on time and within deadlines

Apply revisions based on feedback



Monthly Scope

Around 20 creatives per month to start

Balanced mix of formats (not all video-heavy)

Work is distributed across the month, not rushed all at once



What We’re Looking For

Strong execution skills (clean layouts, readable, ad-focused design)

Ability to follow direction and work from structured briefs

Organized and reliable with deadlines

Clear and consistent communicator

Comfortable using Canva, Adobe and open to AI tools for creative production





Important Requirements

You must be reachable during agreed working hours

This role is not suitable if you are only available during random breaks or late at night

You should have enough capacity to take on consistent monthly work





How We Work

Strategy and direction are provided, your role is execution

Tasks are assigned in batches with deadlines

Feedback is consolidated and structured



To Apply



Please send:

Portfolio (paid ads required)

Screenshot of your Big Five Personality Test result: 

Your current workload

Your typical response time during the day



We prioritize reliability, communication, and consistency over everything else.

title: Manychat VA
description:
**Job Title:** Social Media VA – ManyChat Automation & TikTok Inbox Manager



**About Us:**

Jersey Shore Whale Watch operates the 101-foot vessel "Jersey Girl" out of Belmar, NJ. We run whale watching tours April–October and have a large, active TikTok following 
 
 get tons of engagement but need help turning that attention into ticket sales and merchandise revenue.



**What You'll Do:**

• Monitor and reply to TikTok DMs and ManyChat inbox daily (2–3 hours/day)

• Build, edit, and optimize ManyChat automation flows for ticket and merch sales

• Qualify leads — separate ticket buyers from general inquiries

• Flag hot leads (charters, school groups, corporate bookings) for the owner immediately

• Help set up keyword triggers and comment automation on TikTok

• Send daily summary of inbox activity and any important leads



**You Must Have:**

• Proven ManyChat experience (please show examples or flows you've built)

• Experience managing TikTok DMs or Instagram DMs professionally

• Strong written English — you'll be representing our brand

• Reliable internet and availability during US Eastern morning hours

• Self-starter — you won't be micromanaged, you'll be trusted



**Nice to Have:**

• Experience with Shopify or WooCommerce

• Background in tourism, hospitality, or e-commerce



**Hours & Pay:**

• 2–3 hours per day, 5–6 days per week

• $5–6/hour USD depending on experience

• Long-term position for the right person — we're loyal if you're good



**To Apply:**

Send a short voice or video message introducing yourself and describing a ManyChat flow you've built. Applications without this will not be considered.
